title: Ghostly Figure
description:
Kakashi Hatake, the famed Copy Ninja of Konoha, has seen many horrors in his life. But when he is sent on a mission to investigate a series of mysterious incidents in a remote village on the outskirts of the Land of Fire, he encounters something far more disturbing than any battle he has fought.

The village is gripped by fear, its inhabitants driven to madness one by one. They speak of a curse, a legend passed down for generations-a child with ghostly white hair and crimson eyes who is born every 150 years. This child, they believe, can manipulate the minds of others, driving them to insanity with a mere glance. The villagers have lived in terror, waiting for the cursed child to appear, and now, they are certain she has.

title: The Second Strongest Sorcerer (Jujutsu Kaisen x Male Reader)
description:
What does it mean to be in second place? 

Some may argue that it signifies coming close to victory, having bested all but one. Others may see it as a perpetual shadow cast by the one who stands at the pinnacle.

(Y/N) (L/N) navigates this question as he's known as the Second Strongest Sorcerer of the Modern Era. He never liked this nickname because his dream was to be the Strongest... From his days as a student at Jujutsu High to his tenure as a respected teacher, he strived to achieve that title, however it was deemed impossible... After all, who could defeat Gojo Satoru?  

But who knows..? Maybe... Just maybe... That impossible might become possible.

We're going to find out..

title: рқ’…рқ’“рқ’Ҷрқ’Ӯрқ’Һ рқ’ғрқ’җрқ’ҡ | mattheo riddle
description:
He shows up in her dreams time and time again, the pretty boy with scars on his face and sparkling eyes one could never forget... but he was never supposed to be real. He was supposed to be a fragment of her imagination. Well that's what Jaya Levine thought anyway.

Her disbelief in the existence of this mystery boy was brutally proven wrong, when he made an appearance at Hogwarts... and from the moment she was introduced to him, her heart shattered into a million pieces.

Hatred. That's what she felt towards him, that's what she felt towards Mattheo Marvolo Riddle, son of the Dark Lord... and so she swore to herself that her detestation towards him would never change. He would always be a player. 

A manipulator. 

A cigarette addict. 

A major red flag. 

Someone she would want to stay well away from. 

Turns out, that's a lot harder than it looks.
Tous Droits RГ©servГ©s

title: ~The dancer and the singer~ Michael Jackson fanfic
description:
Warnings!
Mentions of Seizures and description of Seizures.
Death.
Beatings or Assault.
Blood.
Miscarriage.
Panic attacks/Anxiety attacks.
Self harm.
Su!c!de

~If any of this bugs you or affects you in anyway your more than welcome to click off, if not then I hope you enjoy this story! :)~

~Storyline~
Melody was adopted when she was only a few months old, she loved her adoptive family and loved dance, acting, and God.
She was born with epilepsy, a condition that made her have seizures constantly, but that never stopped or got in her way of doing she loved. 
But soon she was stuck in a binding contract for a show called Dance Moms, and her, her sisters Layla and Harmony, her best friends, Clove, Charlie, Liam, and Chloe, are trying everything they can to get off the show, but nothing worked.
If things couldn't get any worse, her and her adoptive mother were shot by her adoptive mother's ex which resulted in the death of her adoptive mother.
This is when a certain singer comes to that very hospital she's staying in and soon they both find out a truth that will change their lives forever.

Story created in: November 26th 2024
Story ended in: Not anytime soon

description:
call it рқҗңрқҗЁрқҗ§рқҗҹрқҗҘрқҗўрқҗңрқҗӯ, as you should,
and you ain't gonna stop this.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

a prank with harmless intentions
causes two best friends to turn
into enemies overnight. yet, to
this day, nobody knows exactly
why рқҗҡрқҗ¬рқҗӯрқҗЁрқҗ«рқҗўрқҗҡ and рқҗңрқҗЎрқҗ«рқҗўрқҗ¬ hate each
other.

things turn from bad to worse
when chris gets a girlfriend who
takes an immediate disliking to
astoria. though beneath all of
the bickering and insults lie
feelings they have both kept
hidden for years.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

вққ it's exhausting, pretending to
hate you. вқһ

вққ you don't hate me? вқһ

вққ we both know i don't. вқһ

title: рқҷ”рқҷӨрқҷӘрқҷ§ рқҷҲрқҷһрқҷЈрқҷҡ | TAEKOOK вң”пёҸ
description:
рқҷ…рқҷӘрқҷЈрқҷңрқҷ рқҷӨрқҷӨрқҷ  рқҷһрқҷЁ рқҷ– рқҷғрқҷҡрқҷ–рқҷ§рқҷ©рқҷЎрқҷҡрқҷЁрқҷЁ,рқҷҲрқҷӨрқҷЁрқҷ© рқҷҒрқҷҡрқҷ–рқҷ§рқҷҡрқҷҷ рқҷ–рқҷЈрқҷҷ рқҷӢрқҷӨрқҷ¬рқҷҡрқҷ§рқҷӣрқҷӘрқҷЎ рқҷҲрқҷ–рқҷӣрқҷһрқҷ– рқҳҪрқҷӨрқҷЁрқҷЁ рқҷ¬рқҷқрқҷӨ рқҷҷрқҷӨрқҷҡрқҷЁрқҷЈ'рқҷ© рқҷңрқҷһрқҷ«рқҷҡ рқҷ– рқҷӣрқҷӘрқҷҳрқҷ  рқҷ©рқҷӨ рқҷ–рқҷЈрқҷ®рқҷӨрқҷЈрқҷҡ рқҷҡрқҷӯрқҷҳрқҷҡрқҷҘрқҷ© рқҷ©рқҷӨ рқҷқрқҷһрқҷЁ рқҷқрқҷ®рқҷӘрқҷЈрқҷңрқҷЁ рқҷ–рқҷЈрқҷҷ рқҷ©рқҷ–рқҷҡрқҷқрқҷ®рқҷӘрқҷЈрқҷң.

рқҷҸрқҷ–рқҷҡрқҷқрқҷ®рқҷӘрқҷЈрқҷң рқҷһрқҷЁ рқҷ– рқҷҺрқҷһрқҷўрқҷҘрқҷЎрқҷҡ,рқҷҺрқҷ–рқҷЁрқҷЁрқҷ® рқҷ–рқҷЈрқҷҷ рқҷҺрқҷ¬рқҷҡрқҷҡрқҷ© рқҳҪрқҷӨрқҷ® рқҷ¬рқҷқрқҷӨ'рқҷЁ рқҷ–рқҷЎрқҷ¬рқҷ–рқҷ®рқҷЁ рқҷЁрқҷҘрқҷҡрқҷЈрқҷҷрқҷһрқҷЈрқҷң рқҷ©рқҷһрқҷўрқҷҡ рқҷ¬рқҷһрқҷ©рқҷқ рқҷқрқҷһрқҷЁ рқҷқрқҷ®рқҷӘрқҷЈрқҷңрқҷЁ, рқҷ…рқҷһрқҷўрқҷһрқҷЈ рқҷ–рқҷЈрқҷҷ рқҷ…рқҷһрқҷЈ.

рқҷ’рқҷқрқҷ–рқҷ© рқҷ¬рқҷһрқҷЎрқҷЎ рқҷ©рқҷ–рқҷҡрқҷқрқҷ®рқҷӘрқҷЈрқҷң рқҷ–рқҷЈрқҷҷ рқҷҹрқҷӘрқҷЈрқҷңрқҷ рқҷӨрқҷӨрқҷ  рқҷҷрқҷӨ рқҷһрқҷӣ рқҷ©рқҷқрқҷҡрқҷ® рқҷӣрқҷӨрқҷӘрқҷЈрқҷҷ рқҷӨрқҷӘрқҷ© рқҷ©рқҷқрқҷ–рқҷ© рқҷ©рқҷқрқҷҡрқҷ§рқҷҡ'рқҷЁ рқҷЁрқҷӨрқҷўрқҷҡрқҷӨрқҷЈрқҷҡ рқҷ¬рқҷқрқҷӨ рқҷ¬рқҷ–рқҷЈрқҷ©рқҷЁ рқҷ©рқҷӨ рқҷ§рқҷӘрқҷһрқҷЈ рқҷ©рқҷқрқҷҡрқҷ§рқҷҡ рқҷҘрқҷҡрқҷ–рқҷҳрқҷҡрқҷӣрқҷӘрқҷЎ рқҷЎрқҷһрқҷӣрқҷҡ?

рқҷ’рқҷ–рқҷ§рқҷЈрқҷһрқҷЈрқҷң:
рқҷ©рқҷӨрқҷҘрқҷңрқҷңрқҷӘрқҷ 
рқҷ—рқҷӨрқҷ©рқҷ©рқҷӨрқҷўрқҷ©рқҷ–рқҷҡ
рқҷ®рқҷӨрқҷӨрқҷЈрқҷўрқҷһрқҷЈ
рқҷЈрқҷ–рқҷўрқҷҹрқҷһрқҷЈ
рқҷқрқҷӨрқҷЁрқҷҡрқҷӨрқҷ 
рқҷўрқҷҘрқҷ§рқҷҡрқҷң
рқҷӣрқҷЎрқҷӘрқҷӣрқҷӣрқҷ®
рқҷўрқҷ–рқҷӣрқҷһрқҷ–
рқҷЁрқҷўрқҷӘрқҷ©рҹ”һ
рқҷқрқҷ–рқҷ§рқҷЁрқҷқ рқҷ¬рқҷӨрқҷ§рқҷҷрқҷЁ
рқҷ©рқҷӨрқҷ§рқҷ©рқҷӘрқҷ§рқҷҡ

рқҷҚрқҷҡрқҷўрқҷһрқҷЈрқҷҷрқҷҡрқҷ§:
рқҷ©рқҷқрқҷһрқҷЁ рқҷһрқҷЁ рқҷўрқҷ® рқҷӣрқҷһрқҷ§рқҷЁрқҷ© рқҷҡрқҷ«рқҷҡрқҷ§ рқҷЁрқҷ©рқҷӨрқҷ§рқҷ®. рқҷ„'рқҷў рқҷЁрқҷӨрқҷ§рқҷ§рқҷ® рқҷӣрқҷӨрқҷ§ рқҷЁрқҷӨрқҷўрқҷҡ рқҷ¬рқҷ§рқҷӨрқҷЈрқҷң рқҷңрқҷ§рқҷ–рқҷўрқҷўрқҷ–рқҷ§ рқҷӨрқҷ§ рқҷЁрқҷӨрқҷўрқҷҡ рқҷ¬рқҷ§рқҷӨрқҷЈрқҷң рқҷ©рқҷ®рқҷҘрқҷҡрқҷӘ рқҷ¬рқҷӨрқҷ§рқҷҷрқҷЁ. рқҷ–рқҷЈрқҷҷ рқҷҷрқҷӨрқҷЈ'рқҷ© рқҷӣрқҷӨрқҷ§рқҷңрқҷҡрқҷ© рқҷ©рқҷӨ рқҷӣрқҷӨрқҷЎрқҷЎрқҷӨрқҷ¬ рқҷўрқҷҡ рқҷңрқҷӘрқҷ®рқҷЁ.

title: рқҗҳрқҗ„рқҗҖрқҗ‘рқҗҚрқҗҲрқҗҚрқҗҶ. || Blue Lock Oneshots
description:

title: Ciel x Neko Reader // Unlucky Lucky
description:
You are a Neko and a demon but you have no idea who/where your real parents are. The only clue you have is that you were found in a cardboard box on the sidewalk with a letter that just said "Take care of her." From then on you moved around constantly because each time you were adopted misfortune would follow. From a flood/fire killing your caretakers or them simply disowning you out of fear of what would happen to them. This time your home was attacked.

(I DO NOT own ANY images or characters unless I say so. This is my first story ever so yup. Please excuse any cringe, horrible grammar, or errors in general. I try my best to post as often as possible but I most likely won't be able to post on weekdays because of school. At the end of the day hope you enjoy the story :O)  )
Y/N can be any ethnicity/race/look you want. The story is made more for a feminine reader but you can just change certain words/pronouns to fit the gender/look/masculinity/feminity you want for Y/N. ENJOY :O)

title: The Loki System
description:
The Wicked Villain System is desperately in search of a host. In comes this sleepy looking guy who doesn't know how he died. 
Mot Doltishend is a mechanic. He's the sleepy looking guy who doesn't know how he died. Anyway, stuff happens, a contract is made, and now he is Loki Odinson, the god of chaos and lies. 

... Oh well, he'll just live a happy life.

-Was what he thought.

{Host, you're not supposed to be OOC!}
"I don't like the armor."
{They'll call you ergi!}
"I'm into guys too. It's fine. Let me enjoy tea. These Asgardian men aren't that bad looking either. Hmmm..."
{But what about Thor?! The story can't go on!}
"Eh, we'll figure something out."

Disclaimer: Loki (except for my own version), the MCU universe, and Asgard does not belong to me. Pictures and drawings also don't belong to me. The only thing I own (out of all this and more) is the plot and the OC(s).
Warning: There will be swearing, BxB, and OOC. Especially for Loki. If you don't feel comfortable with that, then this book may not be the right fit for you.

authorBio:
Hello! I am a perfectionist (stressed-out-student-who-barely-has-a-life-outside-theatre-and-school) by day and an insomniac (coffee-addict-that-knows-they-should-quit-but-realizes-they-might-die-without-it-because-life-is-hard) writer by night.

I can be really lethargic and spacey since I'm usually high on caffeine (which, by this point doesn't get me hyped up anymore, but instead makes me really mellow and soft), but it's okay. I have accepted this side of myself after realizing I have entered the point of no return.

I believe in human equality, the rainbow flag рҹҸіпёҸрҹҢҲ (Adam and Eve, Adam and Steve, Eve and Lillith, etc. They are right. It is natural.), coffee вҳ•пёҸ is a beautiful thing gifted by God, and a long list of other things that make me a proper, respectful, and decent human being.

Did I mention I like snails рҹҗҢ ? And hedgehogs рҹҰ”? And pigeons рҹҗҰ? Yeah, I like snails, hedgehogs, and pigeons.

Trees are great, too. We need more of those. They're really nice.

Let's all get along, yeah?

authorBio: I will remember the kisses, our lips raw with love, and how you gave me everything you had and how I offered you what was left of me. And I will remember your small room, the feel of you, the light in the window, your records, your books, our morning coffee, our noons, our nights, our bodies spilled together, sleeping. The tiny flowing currents, immediate and forever. Your leg my leg. Your arm my arm. Your smile and the warmth of you, who made me laugh again.

title: The Clandestine Reign (Harry Potter Love Story/ Self Insert)
description:
Imagine being ripped away from your life as an ordinary human and thrown into someone else's life. Layla Maore's life is turned upside down. Trapped in what she believed was her sister's fantasy Layla is in for one hell of a ride. Not to mention she now lives the life of none other than Iris Zabini twin sister of Blaise Zabini. Now playing the role of Iris and not knowing how this new world is different or similar to the stories she knows, Iris must walk on thin ice. Should she play the side along character and escape the atrocities or does she have to take things into her own hands and save the future that may or may not be present. Iris knows one thing for sure... Voldemort can never look into her eyes.

(Disclaimer: I don't Own anything all rights go to J.K. Rowling. This is for no profit

authorBio:
Yo! My wonderful readers! I hope you all enjoy all my stories and support me in my dream of becoming a well known author.
So I love to draw, and write. Art frenzy, crazy character, yes, that is what I am.
I love to learn about different languages and cultures.
Which is why I speak Spanish, Russian and Persian. Next stop Japanese and Korean. Random I know, but that is why you'll love me.

I love Harry Potter, The Originals, Black Butler, Naruto, Twilight (story line only).

I love strong female lead characters. I can't stand pushovers, spineless underdeveloped characters.

Follow me and I'll follow you back. If I follow you please reciprocate the action.

I want to go skydiving one day. Oh! and my family considers me a red neck feminist so that will probably show up in my writings a lot.

Live, Laugh, & Love

description:
{рқ—•рқ—јрқ—јрқ—ё рқҹ®}


It all started with a kiss. 

Or better say, everything ended with a kiss. 

What Jenna Potter thought was going to lead her to a beautiful love story, quickly turned into a tragedy; only a week after Sirius Black stole her first kiss, Jenna caught him at school with another girl.

Now, with her trust broken and her heart shattered, Jenna promises herself never to like another boy ever again. But little does she know that the universe has other plans for her.

Not long after, she finds herself slowly falling for Remus Lupin. But with Sirius's feelings for her never truly gone, and her overprotective twin brother there to interfere in it all, Jenna finds her first four years at Hogwarts drowned in chaos.



***

[Marauder's Era]
[OC's age: 11-15]

description:
TADHG LYNCH X FEM!OC

                    "Isn't it just so pretty to think, all along 
             there was some invisible string tying you to me?"

                           
                                  "Hey, Tadhg."
                                                  "Hey, Blue"

INDIGO MILLER LIKES SAFETY. If anything, she yearns for it. Yet the least safe place for her is the place she calls home. 

For a fresh start, she begins to attend Tommen. Will this be a good choice? Or one that leads her further down a path of destruction?

TADHG LYNCH HATES MOST PEOPLE. His walls have been cleverly built from years of trauma, but at what cost?

And what will it take for his walls to crumble?

tying you to me?'
INVISIBLE STRING - TAYLOR SWIFT

вқӯвқӯв”ҖвқҘв”ҖвһЈ 'And i know none of this will matter in the long run.
But i know a sound is still a sound 
around no one.'
I WANT YOU TO LOVE ME - FIONA APPLE


вқӯвқӯв”ҖвқҘв”ҖвһЈ 'Don't let this darkness fool you.
All lights turned off,
can be turned on.'
CALL YOUR MOM - NOAH KAHAN

вқӯвқӯв”ҖвқҘв”ҖвһЈ 'And i'd give up forever to touch you,
cause i know that you feel me somehow. 
You're the closest to heaven that i'll ever be
and i don't wanna go home right now.'
IRIS - THE GOO GOO DOLLS

title: гҖҢ HITLIST гҖҚJM ВІ
description:
book 2 of 4

on the outside, looking in, bianca prescott was back to who everyone knew her as- kook princess, island royalty, who couldn't give less of a fuck about the pogues like they were poo on her jimmy choo's.

but bianca had a hit list. just... not exactly the murder kind.

after her best friend, sarah cameron drowned at sea, punished for her utter infatuation with the wrongly accused murderer, fugitive and ring-leader of the pogues, she knew she had to ruin them all. one by one.

because bianca prescott was a vengeful, vindictive bitch and revenge was sweet, but inflicting it was even sweeter.

title: you'll find me here forever вһі kol mikaelson [ the vampire diaries ]
description:
Lydia Rosette Gilbert. The youngest of the Gilbert siblings. A family known for staying strong and staying together, despite the many tragedies they suffered. That bond never applied to Lydia. She was always second to Elena and Jeremy. Always forgotten by her parents, her friends, and the whole of Mystic Falls. Lydia always knew that something about her was different. She could sense it. But no one ever listened to her when she would voice her concerns. Her siblings have done their best to protect their younger sister after they lost their parents and guardians, but their attempts to shelter her from the cruelties of the world have only isolated her from everyone she loved. They worked hard to keep their lives, filled with vampires and witches, away from her. But all of their work will be undone when she meets Kol Mikaelson and every lie that was told to Lydia is soon uncovered. She just never imagined how deep the lies would go, and how far they would push her into a new family, the Mikaelsons.

Republished and edited from my former account.

In a world where 80% of the population has quirks the other 20% doesn't. izuku yagi, the son of the number one hero was one of those 20%.  Izuku Yagi's life was a nightmare, filled with bullying at school from his supposed friend bakugo and his sister izumi yagi and neglect from his family, including his father, All Might. 

Finding solace in the teachings of Silverfang, an S-class martial artist, Izuku transformed from a weak boy into a powerful, cold fighter. 

His impressive performance at the UA High School entrance exam was sabotaged by All Might, crushing his dreams. Betrayed and disillusioned, Izuku became the Hero Hunter, seeking to expose the corruption in hero society and exact revenge on those who wronged him.

title: Just - Theodore Nott
description:
"He's full of shit for doing that to you." He said quietly

I sighed and hugged him as we slowly moved to the music "I don't even like him". "Yet you're still sad about it, bella"

There was another pause of silence. "I mean, I don't care, but it's not just about the fact that he didn't show up" my voice broke

He softly caressed my chin "It's okay to cry sometimes... even for me..."

"But I don't want to, I don't like it, it doesn't make me feel any better - crying."
"Everyone needs it, or else you'll explode at some point, and that's even worse" his soft words touched me deeply.

"...Thanks, Theo... for everything..."
"Of course, bella, it's what friends do" 

---

Theo and stopped talking much over the summer.

I didn't talk much to any of my other friends either, if you would even call them proper friends; they simply knew me because of my brother Mattheo.

I changed a lot over the summer, both physically and mentally. So God knows what'll happen now as i try and rebuild my life back

---

title: Dreamers // Enoch O'Connor
description:
Ashlyn Wainwright is a peculiar with an odd combination of peculiarities: She's hallucikinetic, cardiokinetic, and amokinetic. In summary, she can find out what people love and fear and conjure images of it.

When her old loop gets attacked, she is saved by Miss. Peregrine.
Ashlyn struggles with controlling her powers, as often while she creates images of what people love it turns into what people fear. 
She is advised to become more stable and secure in herself. To do that, she needs support.
She accidentally becomes good friends with the local dead-riser, more commonly known as Enoch O' Connor. Or, maybe it's more than friends?
__________________

title: The Deception ~ LN4
description:
When Mercedes, a solo traveler and commercial pilot, finds herself dining alone in Monaco, she never expects the evening to take such a surreal turn. But across the room, she spots Lando Norris, the famous Formula 1 driver, trying to enjoy a quiet dinner away from the constant media buzz. Realizing how little genuine human interaction he likely experiences, Mercedes decides to pretend she doesn't recognize him, offering him a rare moment of normalcy. Their casual conversation about racing, aviation, and life on the road quickly evolves into a connection neither of them anticipated.

As the evening unfolds, Mercedes and Lando share an unexpected camaraderie, with Mercedes carefully navigating the line between fan and stranger. But when the truth comes out and Lando realizes she knew exactly who he was all along, it sparks something neither of them expected. Their encounter, initially born out of a small deception, soon turns into a bond that transcends their high-profile worlds.

The Deception is a heartwarming and unexpected story of two people from different worlds finding comfort in each other's company - and discovering that sometimes, the truth isn't as important as the connection that forms in its place.





*THIS IS BASED IN THE YEAR 2029*

I'm just a guy with dreams of becoming a writer, hoping to create stories I can truly be proud of. Inspired by countless creators, I often find myself imagining crafting compelling plots and captivating writing. Though it might sound like wishful thinking, I'm determined to pursue this passion. Right now, I'm working on spin-offs and crossovers of various animes, mangas, light novels, and web novels. But someday, I aim to create an original story of my own.

I deeply appreciate any support, no matter how small, and welcome any criticism-it helps me grow and improve. Feel free to share ideas as well; I might even use them in my work. Thank you for joining me on this journey!

title: Never Let Me Go вҡЎпёҺ [ harry potter ]
description:
вққ рқ“—рқ“ёрқ“өрқ“ӯ рқ“¶рқ”Ӯ рқ“ұрқ“Әрқ“·рқ“ӯ, рқ“Әрқ“·рқ“ӯ рқ“·рқ“®рқ“ҝрқ“®рқ“» рқ“өрқ“®рқ“Ҫ рқ“¶рқ“® рқ“°рқ“ё. вқһ

Grace always felt as if her heart was missing something, like a puzzle piece that got lost. No matter how hard she tried to fill the space with her uncle, or her aunt's family, she knew that nothing could replace that puzzle piece. That puzzle piece: was her father. Growing up she only knew that he left her and her mother one night when she was a year old, and never returned. 

When The Daily Prophet headlines that Sirius Black had escaped Azkaban the summer before her third year at Hogwarts, Grace started questioning everything. Being a thirteen-year-old girl was already hard enough, but to add looming questions, reliving traumatic memories, and realizing she might have feelings for one of her best friends, all while a murderer was on the loose, was becoming too overwhelming.

However, once she learns and accepts the truth about her family, she holds onto it, never letting go. 

Starts in PoA, and ends post DH.

Started: рқҗҢрқҗҡрқҗІ рқҹ—рқҗӯрқҗЎ, рқҹҗрқҹҺрқҹҗрқҹ’.

title: SHINE SO BRIGHT, Paul Aron
description:
Nova Jade Cassidy and Emilio Jude Cassidy are the only two children of the Porsche F1 driver Johnathan Cassidy and tv reporter Martha Jane Summers. From a young age Nova was destined to be a singer anywhere, everywhere was a stage for the young girl. 
After a very nasty ending with her now ex best friend mathew, American singer-songwriter and actress Nova Jade Cassidy is not looking for anything new any time soon relationship or friendship, as she is scared of being hurt or used again. With her debut album getting her three Grammy awards, she now has to keep her fans entertained with more music. 
Emilio Jude Cassidy the oldest of the Cassidy children has followed in his father footsteps and is now racing in F2. 
Emilio decides that his sister needs a break from all the stress song writing is getting her and invites her to one of his F2 races. What happens when the distraction he wanted to give her lasts longer than he expects and by one of his friends.

title: Heartbreak Warfare
description:
"You know what I think?" Harry leaned across the table. "I think you're afraid. You don't take risks like us Gryffindors."

He scoffed. "Please, you Gryffindors are all wand-waving and no spell."

Harry grinned, settling back into his seat. "Not me. I always follow through."

"Prove it."

Harry stood up and walked around the table. He leaned over Draco, one hand no his chair and the other on the table. Their faces were a mere inch apart, so close that Draco could see flecks of brown in his emerald eyes.

"I don't see any follow-through," Draco taunted.

And then Harry kissed him. Harry's hands fell to his shoulders so quickly that Draco teetered on his seat. Draco reached up and grabbed Harry's shirt in an attempt to catch his balance which resulted in the two boys falling to the ground with Harry on top. Harry's cheeks were red with embarrassment as he tried to get up. All he managed to do was knee Draco in the leg.

Draco put his hands on Harry's hips. "Stop. Let me."

In one fluid motion, Draco flipped them around so he was kneeling above Harry.

"And for future reference," Draco smirked, bringing his lips down to brush against his. "I'm always on top."

title: True Form (Avengers x Reader)
description:
"Fix your attitude"


"Fix your eye!"


Yup, that's y/n. She is a sixteen year old shapeshifter, captured by the Avengers and definitely not happy about being held in a cell. She was experimented on by HYDRA, escaped and ran directly into the next organization.

Y/n is forced to stay with the Avengers, who are trying to get her to open up to them, however she has different plans and hides her feelings behind facades that shows every emotion but the real one.

What happens when she comes into contact with a certain blonde, russian spy?

Despite a rough start, maybe this bunch of childish heroes can show her what true friendship is, what true family is, maybe even what true love is...

title: Beneath the facade
description:
Kavya Vajrapati's life took a devastating turn when her fiancГ©, Arjun, abandoned her on their wedding day for his stepsister, Neha, who deceitfully claimed to be suffering from terminal blood cancer and had only a few months to live. Arjun, easily manipulated by Neha's fabricated story, heartlessly left Kavya at the altar, convinced that his sympathy for Neha justified his actions. To make matters worse, Arjun had the audacity to tell Kavya that once Neha passed away, he would come back to her and "make things right." He believed she would wait for him, a thought that only infuriated Kavya.

Heartbroken and seeking an escape, Kavya found herself at a bar that fateful day, where she met a man named Harshavardhan Varma. Harsha, pretending to be a down-on-his-luck gigolo who had just graduated and took on the job to pay for his grandmother's operation, was in fact secretly one of the wealthiest businessmen in the country. For years, Harshavardhan had silently admired Kavya from afar, but he never revealed his true identity. Instead, he chose to approach her as a humble "puppy," biding his time and waiting for the right moment to make his move. Beneath this facade, however, he harbored the intense desire to keep her by his side forever. His ultimate goal was not only to mend her broken heart but to ensure that she would never escape him. He planned to seduce her, believing that once she gave herself to him, she would be bound to him for life.

Kavya's family is renowned in the fashion design industry, and though Arjun is wealthier and more powerful than her, Kavya's position is far from ordinary. Her father had taken over her late mother's family business, and her grandfather had entrusted her with a significant portion of shares in it, adding another layer of intrigue to her life and future.

So how's our Kavya life gonna take turn when Harsha enters in her life

title: The Not So Perfect Potter
description:
The great Harry Potter, defeater of Voldemort, the boy who lived. Not a single thought went out to his older sister for years, yes an older sister. 

Belle Lily Potter, a year older than Harry. She was sent away when the Order of the Phoenix found out Harry and their parents were at risk. For years she had been living in America attending Ilvermorny, until she was nearly discovered by a death eater. Now she lives with family friends in France she is attending Beauxbatons for her fifth year. She know about Harry and often checks in on him with Dumbledore as her messenger. Harry of course knows nothing about her, and that's how it needs to stay, even the knowledge of Belles existence places her in unthinkable danger. She remains the not so perfect Potter. 

Beauxbatons is extremely hard to fit in when you're the only girl who has no Veela in her. But what she can do is Legilimency, where she is able to read any mind she comes across if she wishes and she inherited her father's animagus ability.

Harry may look remarkably like his father and has his mothers eyes, but Belle is an exact replica of Lily Evans, down to every last freckle. But when they travel to Hogwarts for the Triwizard tournament, will she finally get to see her younger brother for the first time since that night.

title: Trust Me (Drarry)
description:
"Do you trust me?"
"With all my heart."

*****

What if it WASN'T Ginny Weasley who sent Harry Potter a musical Valentine in his second year? What if a simple prank sparked a special friendship, or even something more?

But the relationship is more fragile than glass, threatened by emotions, darkness and enemies drawing ever closer. Will it survive? Or will it shatter under the pressure of war?

And let's not forget that Valentine's Day still comes around every year...

title: Spanking One Shots.
description:
There are thousands, no millions of scenes it seems for people to spank or get spanked across the world. Across fiction, and media, in comics and anime. From normal children who might need a more firm hand to get them back on track, to fictional worlds where the punishment seems to have disappeared though a lot of them need it. title: Stay By My Side вң… (Hermione Granger and Draco Malfoy)
description:
Newly Headgirl Hermione Granger returns to Hogwarts for her final year without Harry and Ron.  She is eager for a stress free year but her happiness comes crashing down around her when Draco Malfoy is made Headboy. On the outside he still comes across as the same arrogant, cruel selfish person she knows all too well. However after a series of events where Draco saves her life and comforts her unexpectedly, Hermione realizes that he isn't the man she thinks he is. She knows he is tortured by painful memories from his  past but he is determined to keep that hidden. As the unlikely pairings relationship develops, Hermione is unaware of the heartache, choices and new feelings she will come to discover.

********************************************************
DISCLAIMER:  I do not own any of the character's such as Hermione, Draco, Harry, Ginny, Ron etc as they all rightfully belong to the very talented JK Rowling.  I am merely a huge HP fan who enjoys writing fanfic stories from my perspective. "The way he looks at her. Like she's the most important thing in the world to him." "I think she is."

Experiment X - that's was she was known as. A dangerous weapon that belonged to a lab in the Soviet Union. An assassin. A spy.

A seventeen year old girl who wanted nothing more than to live a normal life. She thinks she finally gets that opportunity when she manages to flee the lab and escape to America - Hawkins, Indiana to be exact. A town with a secret too close to home.

And she managed to live under everyone's noses until one night. A night with demodogs and fighting and flames and... Steve Harrington. The only person that could get past the barriers she held up around herself.

She needed Steve more than anyone. And he needed her.

~season 2-4 are written and published~

"Barrister Babu", Bondita shouted with her voice getting muffled by the rain.
"You refused to be my husband... Tonight, I refuse you as my husband!" Bondita was crying inconsolably. 

Anirudh heard her words, but didn't feel them. He could only see tears flowing down her large eyes. He couldn't take it anymore. In an instance, he ran towards Bondita and scooped her in his arms. Moving her swiftly back to the shade, he pressed her arms against the wall. 

"Never.. again.. shed your tears Bondita. Never ever!" He looked straight into her eyes with an intense fervour before pressing his lips hungrily against hers. 
.........................................

THE UNVENTURED TERRITORY
Dehradun Diaries_
This is the first book of the 'UNVENTURED' trilogy, a fanfiction about Bondita and Anirudh and how they cross huddles, one after the other to find their way back to each other...  Or not. 
The story revolves around intensified passion and epic love, where love is not about submission but is about freedom. 


The story has mature content and hence readers discretion is strictly advised.

Enjoy the story and do let me know how you like each chapter.

title: Shadows of Love
description:
In Shadows of Love, Stiles Stilinski and Davina Moonshadow find themselves caught in a world of magic, danger, and unexpected love as they navigate the complexities of supernatural life in Beacon Hills. After Stiles is cast out by his old pack and rescued by Davina, the two embark on a journey to uncover secrets of their pasts and embrace their true identities as a Spark-Kitsune hybrid and a Guardian elf. As they face old enemies, hidden threats,  they must rely on each other and their loyal pack to protect their family and build a future together.


Shadows of Love is a tale of magic, family, and the enduring power of love that defies all odds.

title: There's Nothing Without You вң”пёҸ
description:
Previous Title : Tum Jo Nahi Toh Kuch Bhi Nahi

---

He sat emotionlessly, his gaze filled with anger as he looked at her. She met his eyes, confused and unable to decipher what was going on in his mind.

The mantras echoed around them, the ceremony unfolding in slow motion. He went through the motions, following the priest's instructions, but his mind was far away, lost in a storm of resentment.

"I can't believe you did this," he seethed inwardly. "I thought you were different, someone who could understand me, but I was wrong. I wanted to marry her, to build a life with her, but you destroyed everything. How could you stoop so low? She asked me to marry you for the sake of my family, for my father's happiness, but I can't. I will never marry someone like you."

Suddenly, he stood up in the middle of the ceremony, his voice cutting through the mantras. "I can't go through with this marriage," he declared, leaving her shocked.
...

She cried silently, trapped in her helplessness as he accused her of a betrayal she had never committed. All she had ever done was love him-deeply, unwaveringly. And that, she realized, was the gravest mistake of her life. Yet, despite the pain, she couldn't bring herself to hate him; her love for him was too profound.

Join her on a journey where love speaks not in words but in silence. Discover how she finally receives the love she deserves, all without uttering a single word. For though she was mute, her eyes spoke volumes, revealing the depths of her heart.

title: рқ•ӯрқ–Ҷрқ–ҷрқ–ҷрқ–‘рқ–Ҡ рқ•ҫрқ–Ҳрқ–Ҷрқ–—рқ–ҳ || Fred Weasley
description:
Prophecy states a child born on the sixteenth of June will rise as a strong witch, loyal to her own, with a rare ability. Shall she aid the Dark Lord. But the greatest betrayal will be made. Fall in love she will and she shall cross the line. The difference between defeat and victory lies within her hands. 

Cassiopeia Evelyn Malfoy, daughter to Narcissa and Lucius Malfoy.  She is raised to believe in blood purity and that her kind were superior. She is bound to rebel against her parents who control her life. And as times are getting darker, she finds her only light.

This is a story of love, hate, trust, and sacrifice. This is her story - her battle scars.


~

*I do not own Harry Potter. I only own any OCs throughout this book. All other characters belong to the amazing J.K Rowling. 

*This story mainly follows the books (as they are superior), though I may add a few scenes from the movies.

title: A Lost Creation
description:
Father Figure Dabi! & Child Reader! 
Originally on Ao3.

Dabi stumbles across Y/N climbing her way into a dumpster, starving after not eating for days, and living on the streets with no sign of parents to keep an eye on her.
He takes her under his wing, refusing to let a child suffer through homelessness on their own.
Not like he had.

They work through life together, learning about each other, themselves and building their relationship more and more along the way.

After all, it was his chance to offer a less-fortunate child happiness and safety he never received growing up.

 

(A self-indulgent fic with multiple chapters for me to work through some of my own life events, except with a decent parental figure.)

description:
"рқҳҫрқҷ–рқҷЈ'рқҷ© рқҷ©рқҷқрқҷҡрқҷ® рқҷҹрқҷӘрқҷЁрқҷ© рқҷҘрқҷЎрқҷ–рқҷ® рқҷ¬рқҷһрқҷ©рқҷқ рқҷ©рқҷқрқҷҡрқҷһрқҷ§рқҷЁрқҷҡрқҷЎрқҷ«рқҷҡрқҷЁ? рқҷ„'рқҷў рқҷ©рқҷһрқҷ§рқҷҡрқҷҷ."


Sleep is life, it was Matsumuri Akito's famous catchphrase whenever someone asks the droopy-eyed male on why he kept sleeping almost all the time.

A third year student in Karasuno High that would often be seen snoring and lazing around, a student who seemed to lack motivation in life. A 'sloth' they call him, but things differ whenever his in the court.


"рқҷҠрқҷқ? рқҷҮрқҷӨрқҷӨрқҷ рқҷЁ рқҷЎрқҷһрқҷ рқҷҡ рқҷ©рқҷқрқҷҡ рқҷЁрқҷЎрқҷӨрқҷ©рқҷқ'рқҷЁ рқҷӣрқҷһрқҷЈрқҷ–рқҷЎрқҷЎрқҷ® рқҷ–рқҷ¬рқҷ–рқҷ рқҷҡ. рқҷӮрқҷӨрқҷӨрқҷҷ рқҷЎрқҷӘрқҷҳрқҷ  рқҷӨрқҷЈ рқҷ©рқҷқрқҷ–рқҷ©, рқҷўрқҷӨрқҷ©рқҷқрқҷҡрқҷ§рқҷӣрқҷӘрқҷҳрқҷ рқҷҡрқҷ§рқҷЁ."

title: Just Breathe || Ron Weasley
description:
Being the sister of Harry Potter aka the boy who lived wasn't an easy thing. It came with the cost of countless sleepless nights, loads of whispering while walking down the hallways, rumors floating around the castle and always being on the run.

But Hailey Potter wouldn't trade her brother for the world

And as they try to make it out alive, she might just start catching feelings for a certain red head.

"Just breathe for me."

Y/N Yeager. The sister of Zeke and half-sister of Eren. 
Two years after Zeke snitched on his parents, Y/N finally decides to abandon Zeke and go to Paradis herself to find her father and her freedom.






"рқҗҳ/рқҗҚ рқҗҳрқҗһрқҗҡрқҗ рқҗһрқҗ«. рқҗҳрқҗЁрқҗ® рқҗ¬рқҗӯрқҗЁрқҗҘрқҗһ рқҗҰрқҗІ рқҗЎрқҗһрқҗҡрқҗ«рқҗӯ рқҗЈрқҗ®рқҗ¬рқҗӯ рқҗҘрқҗўрқҗӨрқҗһ рқҗЎрқҗЁрқҗ° рқҗІрқҗЁрқҗ® рқҗ¬рқҗӯрқҗЁрқҗҘрқҗһ рқҗӯрқҗЎрқҗҡрқҗӯ рқҗЁрқҗ§рқҗһ рқҗӯрқҗўрқҗӯрқҗҡрқҗ§ рқҗӨрқҗўрқҗҘрқҗҘ рқҗңрқҗЁрқҗ®рқҗ§рқҗӯ рқҗҹрқҗ«рқҗЁрқҗҰ рқҗҰрқҗһ"

title: Letters On Our Skin || BangChan
description:
Olivia is content with her life. 
She has a job that pays her bills, even though she absolutely hates it. 
She gives free dance classes twice a week, even though she dreams of doing more than that with her talent. 
Everything is... acceptable. 

But when she meets a boy in the park where she teaches people to dance, her life slowly starts to unravel. Olivia starts to realize life has to be more than just acceptable, but that's easier said than done when the boy you're falling for is an internationally beloved musician and the people you come to love like a family are being watched by millions of eyes from all over the world and managed by one of the harshest managements in the country. 

When Olivia loses her job, she's sure life as she knew it is over. But that's the beauty of being on the ground. The only way to go is up.

OCxBangChan
Slowburn 
Stray Kids FanFiction

title: Wind Wielder
description:
Wind wielders were extinct, as rare as shadow singers, and hunted into extinction millennia ago. Except for one. 
Zara Aphelion was living a double life, cast in the shadow of her own legend. Forced to hide her lineage and abilities, Zara struggles to navigate the beginnings of the second war, and to shoulder the burdens of the secrets she's forced to keep for the Dawn Court. 
But when a certain shadow singer discovers her secrets and forces them out into the open, everything goes to hell, and Zara is thrust down a past she could never have prepared herself for


All rights go to Sarah j Mass, except for Zara and her storyline

title: Stay Away | Eric Coulter [1]
description:
BOOK 1 of 2

All Vanessa Eaton had ever wanted was to start over.  Most of all, she wanted to be free.

When the opportunity to rid herself of her abusive father arises, Vanessa decides to throw caution to the wind and grab fate by its horns.

Her choices lead her to Dauntless and she holds onto hope that her new faction would give her the strength she needed. 

Just when she thinks she has finally caught a break, life throws her a curveball. Not only is she brought face-to-face with her long lost brother, who was nothing like she'd remembered, but a certain blue-eyed leader seems to have his sights set on her. 

Now, Vanessa is faced with a new set of challenges and she must decide who to trust...one wrong move and she might just end up at the bottom of the Chasm.

title: Shadow Stepper |гҖҺ Male OC гҖҸвҖў Arcane
description:
In the world of Runeterra, the city of Piltover and Zaun were on the brink of war. Piltover, a wealthy and technologically advanced city, looked down on the gritty and industrial city of Zaun. The two cities were once united, but now they were divided where Piltover saw Zaun as a backward and uncivilized place.

As tensions rose between the two cities of Piltover and Zaun, a young man named Ozul found himself caught in the middle. Born and raised in Zaun, Ozul had learned to survive by staying in the shadows and using stealth to gain advantages over others.

Will Ozul be able to stay hidden in the shadows long enough to come out on top? Or will he be forced to take a stand and risk everything to protect his home and loved ones?

-----------------------------------------------

Arcane is owned by Christian Linke and Alex Yee.

title: DC Superhero Girls X Male OC Draco (Harem)

You are known as Draco, the Half Human Half Dragon. You have had ten lives the day you were born. You became the greatest hero of Metropolis. Until one day, you discover that you have died. 

Now, you have been running from a bounty hunter your whole life. You have learned that you only have one life left. You try to avoid being Draco in Metropolis,  until one day, a group of girls discover you and ask you to join their team. You start to learn what it's like to not be alone, and the girls discover more about your dragon species you can become. But will your fate change? Will you die, or will you live?

title: Broken Promises || Chris Evans
description:
"A moment of weakness?" She echoes, her voice full of disbelief. "A moment of weakness is when you eat an extra cookie even though you're on a diet. Not cheating with your wife's best friend for months behind her back!"

Chris Evans x Oc

I ONLY OWN MY OC DELILAH 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Chris Evans, the charming and beloved Hollywood actor, seemed to have found his happily ever after with Delilah. They had been married for three blissful years, and their relationship was the envy of many. But behind closed doors, their marriage was not as perfect as it seemed. Unknown to Delilah, Chris had been having an affair with her best friend for several months. The betrayal cut deep, as Delilah had trusted both Chris and her best friend with her heart and her secrets. Little did she know that their betrayal was about to be exposed in the most public and humiliating way possible.

One day, a scandalous leak surfaced online, revealing the sordid details of Chris's affair with Delilah's best friend. The news spread like wildfire, causing a media frenzy and putting their marriage on the brink of collapse. Delilah was devastated and heartbroken, feeling betrayed and humiliated by the people she trusted the most. As the scandal unfolded, Chris tried to make amends and begged for Delilah's forgiveness. He claimed that the affair was a mistake and that he still loved her deeply. But Delilah was not sure if she could ever trust him again, knowing that he had cheated on her with someone she considered a sister.

With their marriage hanging by a thread, Delilah was faced with a difficult decision - whether to forgive Chris and try to salvage their relationship, or to walk away and start anew.

title: Bound in the Shadows / TVD N.M
description:
Have you ever felt frustrated? Imagine being stuck on the other side, bound to someone who can't even see you. That's my life-or rather, my afterlife. I watch him suffer, I feel every ounce of his pain, anger, and love, but no matter how hard I try, I can never reach him. Do my emotions echo back to him, or am I just a ghost whispering into the void?

A hundred years have passed, and still, I wait for someone-just one person-who can finally see me. Until then, I remain in the shadows, unseen but never far from him.

'ONLY ONE PERSON CAN SEE ME!'

'Who are you?'"

рқҗӯрқҗ°рқҗһрқҗ§рқҗӯрқҗІ. рқҗҰрқҗҡрқҗ«рқҗҜрқҗһрқҗҘ. рқҗ©рқҗһрқҗӯрқҗһрқҗ« рқҗ©рқҗҡрқҗ«рқҗӨрқҗһрқҗ«. рқҗӯрқҗЁрқҗҰ рқҗЎрқҗЁрқҗҘрқҗҘрқҗҡрқҗ§рқҗқ.
рқҗ«рқҗһрқҗҡрқҗқрқҗўрқҗ§рқҗ . рқҗ°рқҗ«рқҗўрқҗӯрқҗўрқҗ§рқҗ . рқҗҡрқҗңрқҗӯрқҗўрқҗ§рқҗ . рқҗӣрқҗўрқҗ§рқҗ рқҗўрқҗ§рқҗ  рқҗӯрқҗҜ.
рқҗЎрқҗЁрқҗ©рқҗһрқҗҘрқҗһрқҗ¬рқҗ¬ рқҗ«рқҗЁрқҗҰрқҗҡрқҗ§рқҗӯрқҗўрқҗң.

вқӣрқ‘–'рқ‘ҡ рқ‘Һ рқ‘ӣрқ‘Һрқ‘Ўрқ‘–рқ‘Јрқ‘’ рқ‘ңрқ‘“ рқ‘ рқ‘ңрқ‘ўрқ‘Ўв„Һрқ‘Өрқ‘’рқ‘ рқ‘Ў рқ‘ҷрқ‘ңрқ‘ӣрқ‘‘рқ‘ңрқ‘ӣ рқ‘‘рқ‘Һрқ‘ҹрқ‘ҷрқ‘–рқ‘ӣрқ‘”. вқң

вқӣ рқ‘Һ в„Һрқ‘’рқ‘ҹрқ‘ң рқ‘Өрқ‘–рқ‘ҷрқ‘ҷ рқ‘җв„Һрқ‘ңрқ‘ңрқ‘ рқ‘’ рқ‘Ўв„Һрқ‘’ рқ‘Өрқ‘ңрқ‘ҹрқ‘ҷрқ‘‘ рқ‘ңрқ‘Јрқ‘’рқ‘ҹ рқ‘Ұрқ‘ңрқ‘ў, рқ‘Һ рқ‘Јрқ‘–рқ‘ҷрқ‘ҷрқ‘Һрқ‘–рқ‘ӣ рқ‘Өрқ‘ңрқ‘ўрқ‘ҷрқ‘‘ рқ‘ҳрқ‘–рқ‘ҷрқ‘ҷ рқ‘Ўв„Һрқ‘’ рқ‘Өрқ‘ңрқ‘ҹрқ‘ҷрқ‘‘ рқ‘“рқ‘ңрқ‘ҹ рқ‘Ұрқ‘ңрқ‘ў. вқң

вқӣрқ‘–'рқ‘ҡ рқ‘–рқ‘ӣрқ‘Ўрқ‘–рқ‘ҡрқ‘–рқ‘‘рқ‘Һрқ‘Ўрқ‘’рқ‘‘ рқ‘Ҹрқ‘Ұ рқ‘Ўв„Һрқ‘’ рқ‘“рқ‘’рқ‘Һрқ‘ҹ рқ‘ңрқ‘“ рқ‘Ҹрқ‘’рқ‘–рқ‘ӣрқ‘” рқ‘Һрқ‘Јрқ‘’рқ‘ҹрқ‘Һрқ‘”рқ‘’. вқң

вқӣрқ‘Өрқ‘’ рқ‘ҡрқ‘–рқ‘”в„Һрқ‘Ў рқ‘Һрқ‘  рқ‘Өрқ‘’рқ‘ҷрқ‘ҷ рқ‘Ҹрқ‘’ рқ‘Ўв„Һрқ‘’ рқ‘ҷрқ‘ңрқ‘ӣрқ‘’рқ‘ҷрқ‘–рқ‘’рқ‘ рқ‘Ў рқ‘җрқ‘ҹрқ‘’рқ‘Һрқ‘Ўрқ‘ўрқ‘ҹрқ‘’рқ‘  рқ‘–рқ‘ӣ рқ‘Ўв„Һрқ‘’ рқ‘ўрқ‘ӣрқ‘–рқ‘Јрқ‘’рқ‘ҹрқ‘ рқ‘’, рқ‘ҷрқ‘ңрқ‘ңрқ‘ҳрқ‘–рқ‘ӣрқ‘” рқ‘“рқ‘ңрқ‘ҹ рқ‘ рқ‘ңрқ‘ҡрқ‘’рқ‘Ўв„Һрқ‘–рқ‘ӣрқ‘”...в„Һрқ‘ўрқ‘ҡрқ‘Һрқ‘ӣ рқ‘–рқ‘ӣ рқ‘Ўв„Һрқ‘–рқ‘ӣрқ‘”рқ‘  рқ‘Ҹрқ‘’рқ‘Ұрқ‘ңрқ‘ӣрқ‘‘ в„Һрқ‘ўрқ‘ҡрқ‘Һрқ‘ӣрқ‘ . вқң

вқӣрқ‘ рқ‘Ўрқ‘Һрқ‘ҹрқ‘  рқ‘‘рқ‘ңрқ‘ӣ'рқ‘Ў рқ‘ в„Һрқ‘–рқ‘ӣрқ‘’ рқ‘Ҹрқ‘’рқ‘җрқ‘Һрқ‘ўрқ‘ рқ‘’ рқ‘Ўв„Һрқ‘’рқ‘Ұ рқ‘Өрқ‘Һрқ‘ӣрқ‘Ў рқ‘Ўрқ‘ң рқ‘Ҹрқ‘’ рқ‘ рқ‘’рқ‘’рқ‘ӣ; рқ‘Ўв„Һрқ‘’рқ‘Ұ рқ‘ в„Һрқ‘–рқ‘ӣрқ‘’ рқ‘Ҹрқ‘’рқ‘җрқ‘Һрқ‘ўрқ‘ рқ‘’ рқ‘Ўв„Һрқ‘’рқ‘Ұ рқ‘Һрқ‘ҹрқ‘’ рқ‘ рқ‘Ўрқ‘Һрқ‘ҹрқ‘ . вқң

вң§пҪҘпҫҹ: *вң§пҪҘпҫҹ:* пҪЎпҪҘпҫҹпҫҹпҪҘ В·*М©М©НҷЛҡМ©МҘМ©МҘ*М©М©МҘНҷгҖҖвң©гҖҖ*М©М©МҘНҷЛҡМ©МҘМ©МҘ*М©М©НҷвҖ§Нҷ пҪҘпҫҹпҫҹпҪҘпҪЎ*:пҪҘпҫҹвң§*:пҪҘпҫҹвң§

Narnia had always been a free country, until she came along. Jadis was the devil in disguise, and she brought to the kingdom an eternal winter and a dictatorship. 
England was suffering with the Second World War. Nazi Germany wouldn't stop the air raiding, forcing the people to flee. And it was no different for the Pevensies. 
When the Pevensies meet a adventurous girl named Olivia in a grand mansion in the countryside, their worlds collide and they find themselves caught up in another war and prophecies. Together, they have to figure out a way to save everyone- especially themselves.

title: the last verse ; harry potter [2]
description:
вққThe powerful play goes on and you may contribute a verse. What will your verse be?вқһ

Life can change in just a single moment. Diana Riddle felt it, as did the rest of the world. This was the beginning of the end. No longer was she a child; she was a warrior, a leader. She was the savior.

In the midst of a war, now without her beloved mentor, she travels this road alone. To destroy Tom Riddle--it was what she was born for. Before she goes, though, she vows to die with memories, not dreams. To live before she dies. She has people to fight for now. Friends and family. She has something to live for, even if it's only for a short time.

So she was going to fight. She was going to destroy what destroyed her, in the end.

This is the end. The end of a war. The end of Diana Riddle.

"I don't understand you so many times..."

A gameplay request from an unknown player?

Online game to online texts to voice calls to smiling at each other in person.

Tous Droits RГ©servГ©s
authorBio:
Top 4 things you need to know about me as an author:
1) I love Harry Potter and Dramione is my ship
2) don't like, don't read - all hate will be deleted
3) I'm known for brutally destroying the fourth wall
4) Practically all my books should be rated mature because I have a colorful vocabulary lol

More about me...

Books are my drug. And It's my dream that one day I'll create a book series that is so addicting, you can't put down the books for anything. You'll stay up until 2 am on a school night reading. A book series that you'd stand outside a book store for hours waiting until you can feel that book in your hands. And when you take that book home, you finish it in a day and have to wait another year until another comes out. I want people to cry over my character deaths. I want them to laugh and cry with the characters i create. I want them to think about them every time someone says something that has anything to do with my books.

And yet, every time I compare myself to J.K. Rowling... to Rick Riordan... to Veronica Roth. And I sigh and shut my writing book and think... I'll never me as good as them. They created worlds I want to live in and my heart twists a little as I think of the worlds they have created.

I am nothing but a struggling teen author... but I'm not giving up until I've been denied by every editor or publisher in the country. And even then... I'll find a way.

title: Spaces (h.s.)
description:
рҹ’Ң "Spaces" is a Harry Styles fanfic based on my One Direction DR

вҖјпёҸ This story will contain the use of drugs, alcohol, instances of panic attacks, troubling scenes, etc. so please be wary when reading this story.

----

Ali Evermore is an 18 year old aspiring singer who attempts to balance between navigating her internal emotions struggles, her blossoming romances as well as her and her band's journey through the music industry.

As the narrative unfolds, you will be taken back to the nostalgic days of One Direction in the 2010's to explore Ali's experiences with the band members-Harry Styles, Liam Payne, Louis Tomlinson, Niall Horan, and Zayn Malik. The story provides insight into the challenges and triumphs of fame, the dynamics within the group, and Ali's personal journey. "Spaces" offers a blend of romance, nostalgia, and the intricacies of life in the spotlight. 

This story offers a raw and intimate look at love and close connections when it's forced to find a way to stay alive and make it out unscathed under the magnifying glass of the public eye.

27|aspiring author|ex-fangirl|full-time dreamer|achieving catharsis one chapter at a time.

i love writing about good people in impossibly bad situations. my soft spot lies with flawed characters; with redemption stories; with the raw, painful experiences that make us who we are. i'm obsessed with fate versus choice, with how characters react to what happens around them.

i've known nothing in my life except books and writing. knowing that people like you take time out of your day to read what i wrote is a feeling that is quite frankly... indescribable. i have no words.

your support means so much to me; every vote, every comment, every time you add my work to your library, it makes me feel like i am walking on clouds. thank you so much, you matter the world to me.

title: HО№С• Hero (Saitama X Wife!Reader) [Book 1]
description:
Behind every great man is a great woman, that's how the saying goes. But how can that apply to our favorite bald hero? Simple, what if he had someone beside him even before the start of his grand adventure? Someone who had been a constant presence, an unrelenting beacon of support, and whom never failed to care and love him no matter what happened?

Meet (Name) (Surname), or Mrs. Saitama as she's teasingly called by her friends ever since she married the adorable buffoon she calls a husband. Sure, he may not be the shiniest egg in the carton or have an office job and raking in a 6-digit paycheck, but you wouldn't have him any other way. Because while he may be a NEET to some people and a cheater to others, that will never change the fact that he was your hero...as you were his.

вҖў вҖў Book One in the SPARK duology вҖў вҖў

"Hey wait there a second, invisible boy. I never said I had feelings for Enoch."

"Oh please," he scoffed. "The romantic connection between the two of you is so excruciatingly considerable that it blinds me." 

вҖў

Adeira Langston has struggled with her past and peculiarity for a long time. Unintentionally, she hurts people and has the power to kill them at her very will. She needs a base; someone to keep her at bay and in control. 

And the person that does is a dead-riser she clicked with easily and unexpectedly.

вҖў I wrote this book a couple of years ago now, so I apologize for the cringieness, all of the clichГ©s, and hopeless romantic writings. :) вҖў

title: Christmas with the Leclerc's
description:
The f1 season is coming to an end, and Christmas is creeping up on Charles Leclerc, but the Ferrari driver has one problem he needs to solve before Christmas.

He has no one to take care of his 5 year old son, while he travels around the world. And there's one slight problem to solving that...

Julius Leclerc, Charles Leclerc's son, has grown quite a bad reputation, despite the fact he's only 5 years old. For several years, Julius has scared away every nanny he has had, no one being able to control the energy filed brunette. 

But at the Brazilian Grand Prix, Charles runs into Carolina, a beautiful Brazilian girl, who miraculously manages to calm Julius down.

Charles left in shock over the special girl, immediately hires her as Julius's nanny for the remaining races of the season.

But what happens when Charles finds himself looking at Carolina as more than just Julius's nanny, and will his past get in the way of the feelings he gets....

title: I will save you (Kunikuzushi x fem!reader)
description:
Please note: Due to the timing of this book's release and the release of the 3.0+ patch(es) in Genshin Impact, Scaramouche is called 'Kunikuzushi' throughout the book. Please take note and remember this while reading.

-------------------------

She hates them and they hate her. Y/n lived in Japan, trying and hoping for a peaceful life. However when she gets kicked out of her own house, things get complicated.

She gets hit by a car and instead of a hospital, she wakes up in another world.

500 years into the past, Y/n knows what the future holds for a certain person she cares about. And so she decides to change his future.

"I will save you from your future."

It seems... there are a lot of complications with her new and old life, and current occurrences. 
Her past life continues to haunt her and eventually... it catches up with her.

title: As Potter is to Snape
description:
Severus Snape has agreed to take in Harry Potter during the summer before his Third Year. Temporarily. Just until the end of summer and not a day longer. But secrets about Harry's home life are being revealed and things are changing too fast for Harry to keep up. Can he and Snape survive their time together? If not, it's going to make for a very long summer. I've moved up the blowing up of Marge to the very beginning of summer.
This is 100% an AU. Almost everything is different and you'll see that from the very beginning. 
Adding to say that it's so AU that Dumbledore and McGonagall are married (he's been aged down and there's a whole post about it) and they adopted snape when he was 14. This is apparently the thing that catches people the most off guard lol. 
Crossposted on ao3 and ffn under the same name.

title: Didn't See That Coming | The Walking Dead(1)
description:
Savannah born CJ Jefferson, 33 years of age when the dead rose and the living began to fall.
Her father, a former corporal in the army, raised his 2 children to be able to survive and adapt to any and all situations.

At the end of the world, after losing everything and trapped in the city belonging to the fallen, CJ is rescued and brought to a group of strangers she grows to love and protect.
But when everyone is so busy worrying about the dead, it's easy to forget that the living are just as dangerous.

*****

"I used to think I could see everything that was coming for me, but apparently my mind has a blind spot," 

"No one coulda' seen any a' this comin'. But just 'cause you can't see it, don't mean you ain't ready."

"I'm sorry I called you an asshole. You might be a prick but you're not an asshole."

"Gee thanks"

*****

OC x Daryl Dixon

title: The Lost Time Lord (A Doctor Who/Tenth Doctor Fanfiction)
description:
Mary Perdita didn't know a thing about herself.

That's not just seem deep metaphorical phrase, she really didn't. Mary Perdita is just a name that she made up. She doesn't know how old she is, she has no idea where she came from. The only thing she remembers is waking up in a dirty alleyway in London with a locket around her neck. That and the fact that she has some of the strangest dreams about the most insane things: Time ships and a planet surrounded by a glass dome...the death of two unnamed adults.

Because of these dreams, Mary has knowledge of aliens races and history that she shouldn't have. Knowledge that ends up being true, as she  learns when she begins to investigate strange goings on with none other than Sarah Jane Smith, which eventually leads her to the one person that might be able to figure out where she came from, why she has no memories, and why her dreams hold true other-worldly facts.

Mary needs a Doctor...and luckily for her, she may have found just the man for the job.

description:
Lillian Bianca Jones and Rafe Cameron have been enemies for as long as they can remember, but when the tide switches, things change. The waves take the past with them delicately. Will it be brought back to land? There are uncertainties in the ocean, things that we will never know. Lillian may never find out why he did what he did, or maybe she will. That's a thing only the sea knows... 
In this story signals can be read from different parts of the shore.

title: The Disastrous Life of Saiki K || Saiki Kusuo x OC Male Reader
description:
Hasegawa Kei was sort of selectively mute. He technically can still speak, but he rarely does it as his voice is quiet, raspy, and deeper than most. Kei recently started high school, and he dreaded the day like the plague. When people found out Hasegawa was mute, he always got mixed reactions. Most would steer clear of him. Kei has come to terms with not having many friends, but what will he think when a bubbly, weird kid with blue hair wants to be friends? Teruhashi, ever the egoist, was determined to make every guy fall at her feet and say "oh wow." However, what will Teruhashi think when she finds out the reason both quiet kids in her class refuse to say "oh wow."

description:
вһҘCOMPLETED

Being the twin sister of the famous Harry Potter would make your life an adventurous journey. At least that's what you would think, wouldn't you? Being Ember Potter was everything; everything but adventurous. 

Growing up with Harry in Little Whinging, Surrey, Ember was the plain opposite to her brother when it came to dangerous and threatening events, and Harry was busy keeping it that way. 

Things dramatically changed when their 4th year at Hogwarts started and the girl living in the shadows was suddenly enlighted by the spotlights in a more than unpleasant way.

description:
вҳҫпёҺрқҗ»рқ‘’рқ‘ҹ рқ‘ҷрқ‘ңрқ‘Јрқ‘’ рқ‘Өрқ‘Һрқ‘  рқ‘ҷрқ‘–рқ‘ҳрқ‘’ рқ‘”рқ‘ҷрқ‘Һрқ‘ рқ‘ , рқ‘Ҹрқ‘’рқ‘Һрқ‘ўрқ‘Ўрқ‘–рқ‘“рқ‘ўрқ‘ҷ рқ‘Ҹрқ‘ўрқ‘Ў рқ‘“рқ‘Ўрқ‘Һрқ‘”рқ‘–рқ‘ҷрқ‘’. рқ‘Ӯрқ‘ӣрқ‘җрқ‘’ рқ‘ в„Һрқ‘Һрқ‘Ўрқ‘Ўрқ‘’рқ‘ҹрқ‘’рқ‘‘, рқ‘–рқ‘Ў рқ‘җрқ‘ңрқ‘ўрқ‘ҷрқ‘‘ рқ‘ӣрқ‘’рқ‘Јрқ‘’рқ‘ҹ рқ‘Ҹрқ‘’ рқ‘Ўв„Һрқ‘’ рқ‘ рқ‘Һрқ‘ҡрқ‘’ рқ‘Һрқ‘”рқ‘Һрқ‘–рқ‘ӣ.вҳҪпёҺ

.

" Y/n, you need to stay away from Daniel. He's not good for you."

" What? Not again,Johnny. Why should I stay away from Daniel?"

" Because....because you are mine."

.

Johnny, the ultimate bully of the 80s and Y/n, a girl who can't stand bullying.

Y/n was a tough girl, but then one day, she stood up to the school bully. She got his attention, but in a bad way. Through the journey, Daniel, the new boy becomes friends with Y/n, which seemed to bother Johnny. But he tried to hide the actual reason in the name of bullying.

He was the only one whose words hurt y/n, words which could make her cry too.

He said to her that he would change but he just couldn't.

.
.
.
I own half of  the plot not the characters.  The plot will be a mixture of both the film and some magic of mine.

title: I WILL PROTECT YOU
description:
рқҗҲ рқҗ–рқҗҲрқҗӢрқҗӢ рқҗҸрқҗ‘рқҗҺрқҗ“рқҗ„рқҗӮрқҗ“ рқҗҳрқҗҺрқҗ”
  [рқ‘Җрқҗҙрқҗҝрқҗё рқ‘Җрқҗјрқҗҫрқҗҙрқ‘Ҷрқҗҙ рқ‘Ӣ рқ‘…рқҗёрқҗҙрқҗ·рқҗёрқ‘…]

рқҗ…рқҗҡрқҗӯрқҗһ-
  Y/n Jaeger the twin sister of Eren Jaeger, helps her brother rescue a missing boy. A boy from the mountains who was stolen after witnessing his parents death. Being from the Ackerman family he felt an urge of strength to protect the twins that saved his life.

  In later years they found out that both Eren and Y/n are titan shifters, Y/n somehow being able to predict the movements of other titan shifters. Having a voice in her head that is slowly telling Y/n the truth about the world and herself. Slowly making her realize that the power blessed upon her to save humanity was more of a curse. 

-

''рқҳұрқҳірқҳ°рқҳ®рқҳӘрқҳҙрқҳҰ рқҳ®рқҳҰ рқҳәрқҳ°рқҳ¶'рқҳӯрқҳӯ рқҳўрқҳӯрқҳёрқҳўрқҳәрқҳҙ рқҳ§рқҳӘрқҳЁрқҳ©рқҳө.''

~

They were just kids...they fell in love, they were happy. 
But one mistake can tear it all down. One mistake can make the world change for the rest of their lives. 
So what happens when the world goes to shit for them? 
What happens when Vi and Maeve have to battle through their different lives seperated?
And what is to happen when they find each other once again?

~

title: Two Of A Kind || Lee Heeseung
description:
Clara and Heeseung are fundamentally different.

She is cheerful, well-behaved and hardworking. The daughter of her mother and more concerned about the well-being of others than her own.

He is dismissive, mean and arrogant. He is the boy no mother would like to have as a son-in-law.

Since junior school, the two have been cleverly avoiding each other. Clara wants nothing to do with Heeseung and Heeseung himself, doesn't even know she exists. Until one day Clara moves into the house next door and the parents of the two teenagers become friends. Because Heeseung's parents want him to take responsibility, he pretends to be Clara's boyfriend and from then on one thing leads to another.
- - -

She does not wish to find love or romance or to marry. So she is shocked when she finds she cannot resist no other than the second born Bridgerton.

title: The Tragic Jedi  | Anakin Skywalker
description:
| The Wattys 2022 Shortlist |

рқ‘«рқ’җрқ’Ҹ'рқ’• рқ’Ӯрқ’Қрқ’Қ рқ’үрқ’Ҷрқ’“рқ’җрқ’Ҷрқ’” рқ’…рқ’Ҡрқ’Ҷ рқ’Ҡрқ’Ҹ рқ’•рқ’үрқ’Ҷ рқ’Ҷрқ’Ҹрқ’…?

Taken from an early age from her family in Scarif in the Outer Rim, Astrid Katarn has been training her whole life to become a Jedi Master for the Jedi Order. As a Padawan, Astrid first meets Anakin Skywalker, the notoriously rebellious Padawan of Jedi Master, Obi Wan Kenobi, during The Gathering, the rite of passage Padawans must undergo to build their own lightsaber. 

When Astrid forms an unlikely bond with Anakin during their Gathering, she has no idea the sorts of adventures and mischief in store for her future... some of which include harrowing escapes from the treasonous Separatist and certain Sith Lords some thought long dead...

~~ The Padawan-- between TPM and AOTC and during AOTC (Act 1) 
~~ The Jedi Knight-- The Clone Wars (Act 2)
~~ The Sith -- Revenge of the Sith (Act 3)
~~ The Rebel-- Rogue One and afterwards (Act 4)

Book cover created by the amazing @simpomatic

title: Steal His Heart - Hyunlix
description:
Slowburn Hyunlix 

Felix has been with his long-term boyfriend Wooyoung for the past 4 years. He thought everything was perfect. They moved in together after college, built their own traditions, had their favorite spots, and even adopted a kitten last year. All he was missing was a ring. 

What he believed to be a clear path for the future, would turn out to be more blurry than he expected when Wooyoung's childhood best friends moves back to Korea and enters his life.

title: Kid Danger's Girlfriend (Henry Danger: Book 2)
description:
Three years ago, Arabella Manchester never imagined she would be where she is today. She never expected to go to high school, have friends, deal with bullies, have body image issues, and most of all be dating her father's sidekick, Henry Hart/Kid Danger. Arabella has grown up a lot since the start and she's been through a lot, not to mention finding out that Drex is her biological father and gaining a superpower called Plant Manipulation. Arabella struggles not only with her body image and self esteem issues, but also with her dyslexia. She hasn't told Henry or anyone(besides her father) about it and she feels embarrassed that she can't read or write as well as everyone else. She's improved, but still struggles with it. Arabella doesn't want to worry anyone with her problems, when she knows Henry and her father already have so much going on with their superhero lives and other things. Henry loves his girlfriend and notices her struggles, but she pushes him away and tells him not to worry. Tension and drama arises between the couple when their trust is put to the test and Henry doesn't think Bella trusts him enough to tell him everything. The Henbella couple isn't as perfect as it seems. Can Henry get Bella to trust him and help his little goofball? Or will she push him away so much that Henry gives up and calls it quits?

STOP! If you haven't read the first book, please go back and read the first book of this series. It's called Captain Man's Daughter and it has the first three seasons of Henry Danger in it. If you don't read it, you'll be very confused and not caught up. Thank you!

title: Guarded Hearts || Yoon Jeonghan ||
description:
Yoon Jeonghan, heir to a powerful empire, harbors deep-seated resentment toward his father, fueled by a dark family secret. His rebellious nature earns him a reputation as untamable.

When his father appoints Jessica Young, an inexperienced security guard, as his personal protector, Jeonghan sees it as another attempt at control. Determined to resist, he vows to make her job impossible. 
. 
. 
. 
. 
As their cat-and-mouse game begins, Jeonghan's mastery of manipulation clashes with Jessica's unwavering dedication. Will their unlikely pairing ignite a consuming passion or spark Jeonghan's downfall - or redemption?
Tous Droits RГ©servГ©s

title: Rivals x Lovers бҘ«бӯЎ | Damianya (Spy x Family)
description:
A fanfiction about Anya Forger x Damian Desmond based 10 years after the Spy x Family manga/anime.

Anya starts to feel hopeless about becoming an imperial scholar. She knows she needs to start getting closer to Damian to create "world peace". Damian will soon understand that he cannot be oblivious to his feelings towards Anya anymore. 

However, a secret organization, that Anya was a test subject in, is trying to track her down and take her back to the facility. Even if they both develop feelings for each other, will they be able to be together forever?

title: Finding Me (Todoroki x Reader)
description:
"...You can't go through life on your own, just like a hero can't always save the day on their own. Sometimes, they need a bit of help from their friends..."

I held out my hand again, but this time, I was more determined than before. More certain of what I was after. 

"So what do ya say, Todoroki," I said, "Do you wanna be friends?"

~~~~~~~~

You were a quirkless child with an impossible dream of becoming a hero. One day, your dream is given hope in the form of your very own Quirk. 

Now, attending UA High School in the Hero Course, you're on the road towards fulfilling your dream. However, surprising encounters and unimaginable trials are thrust into your life, and you will have to rely on the strength of your friends, and your own sheer will, to succeed.

But one particular icy-hot bastard isn't so easy when it comes to your friendship. Will you melt the cold cage around his heart, or will you be burnt by his flames of hatred and resentment.

This is your journey about becoming a hero, and finding yourself...

title: вқҘ рқ•Ӣрқ•ҷрқ•– рқ”»рқ•’рқ•Јрқ•ң рқ•Һрқ•’рқ•Јрқ•Јрқ•ҡрқ• рқ•Ј || Yandere Blue Lock x Fem Reader ||
description:
вққI love you so much that I'd do anything to make you mine, even if it means taking drastic measures to keep you by my side forever. After all, what is a little sacrifice compared to the eternal bliss of our love? вқһ

в•°в”ҲвһӨ You have always been a bright child since you were born. You started playing soccer since you where 5 and you loved it. Soccer was your whole world and after you played in your first game your team won! After your team won everyone started calling you a child prodigy! When you started high school you joined your high school's soccer team which was Ichinan High School women's soccers team. When you and your team won the women's high school championship you were ecstatic! A few days after your team won you got a mysterious letter in your mailbox. When you opened the letter the letter was asking you to join a special program about soccer. You settled that you were going to join and then you found out that it was an all boys soccer program and you were the only girl. So will you make new friends in this program and strive to become the best striker you can be or will you have to deal with the many people who are now obsessed with you.

Written by Pwuddles

title: Warmth Of A Genius | Classroom Of The Elite
description:
The Advanced Nurturing High School in Japan is known far and wide by youth all across the country. Boasting a 100% employment and college entry rate, it's a school that focuses on nurturing young students to support the country later in life. Having found himself in Class A, Ayanokouji Kiyotaka enrolls in the hopes of living a normal life as an ordinary highschooler. However, his plans quickly seem to fall apart when a student from his own class, Sakayanagi Arisu, seems to know just a bit too much about Ayanokouji's past.

Disclaimer: This is a fanfiction of the lightnovel "Classroom of the Elite". The canon story and characters are owned by Kinugasa Syougo.

title: рқҗҮрқҗҖрқҗ“рқҗ„ рқҗ“рқҗҺ рқҗҒрқҗ„ рқҗӢрқҗҖрқҗҢрқҗ„ ; spencer reid ВІ
description:
вққyou're in danger here, spencer.вқһ
вққwe'll worry about that later. right now all that matters is you and me.вқһ

hazel finley is afraid. afraid of being alone. afraid of losing the people she loves. afraid of making mistakes. afraid of falling back into love with the best man she's ever met. working with the bau put her family in danger. so she ran. and she feels guilty every morning when she wakes up. but when her old boss shows up, asking her to come back to fill a void on the team, fin hesitates. she doesn't want to face the people she hurt. but hotch convinces her. 
spencer reid is broken. everyone he's ever loved has left him. his father, elle, gideon, and now the true love of his life: hazel finley. the most beautiful girl in the world. so when she walks through the bau doors, smiling the way she did the day they met, he's not quite sure how to feel. angry? confused? sad? happy. truly happy. he's so happy she's home.
but fin's not ready to let spencer back in. she won't hurt him again. not when the woman she used to call mother is waiting to pounce.
and fin's the type of girl spencer would spend a lifetime waiting for.

description:
~What if Rhysand's sister had fought back the day that Tamlin's father hunted them down? Fought enough to buy her life?~

Arwen escaped that day, scarred and ruined, but alive. Residing in her brother's city, she hides behind a mask of bliss before the coming of Amarantha. At a stranger's glance, there is little more she could ask for. Expensive dresses line her wardrobes, a home of great expanse, a circle of friends, and most of all, a mate. But pain boils behind that mask, and soon it will spill over. It was only a matter of time.

title: You : Tom Riddle
description:
What if Tom Riddle's inability to love was just a myth...?

They were raised in the same orphanage and did everything together. They even got accepted into Hogwarts together but were separated.
Now, Tom thinks of her as an enemy. At least, that's not what his cold heart is telling him.
Eventually, Victoria Clearwater finds herself in a tough situation. She has to betray someone she loves in order to protect the other person she loves dearly.
The fate of Hogwarts and The Muggle World depends on her decision.

title: Fated in Green
description:
Rosalie Potter, Harry's twin sister and a Slytherin, never expected to find herself tangled in the secrets and shadows of her house. But when the son of Voldemort, Mattheo Riddle, enters her orbit, their fiery clashes spark more than just hatred. As tensions rise at Hogwarts with Voldemort's return and Umbridge's reign of terror, Rosalie must navigate forbidden alliances, a secret defense group, and the growing pull toward the boy she swore to hate.

With Estella Black, Pansy Parkison, and Astoria Greengrass, her loyal friends, the lines between love and rivalry blur. When truth or dare games turn dangerous and duels become personal, will Rosalie uncover where her true loyalties lie-or will the shadows consume her first?

A slow-burn enemies-to-lovers story filled with tension and heartbreak.

title: Unrequited
description:
Dontavius has been in love with Diamond since they were kids. When they were 23 and 22 respectively and finally began exploring a relationship together, Dontavius thought he finally had everything he'd ever wanted. But when Diamond ended up cheating and coming out of it with a baby, Dontavius realized that the love of his life didn't love him as much as he does.

Diamond claims to love Dontavius, but even three years after making his son, he still can't bring himself to stay faithful to his boyfriend, even when the looming threat of Dontavius leaving him becomes apparent.

Neither of them expects a bright eyed, Spanish speaking young man named Raymonte to approach Dontavius and suddenly start fighting for his heart and showing him the love he should've been getting the whole time while Dontavius continues to fight for his shattered relationship.

Dontavius has the choice of staying with Diamond and letting him continue to hurt him, or giving Raymonte a chance to show him a better life.

authorBio:
Hey there! I'm a passionate lover of all things manga and anime-there's just something about those colorful worlds and epic stories that totally draws me in. Whether it's a heartwarming slice-of-life or an action-packed adventure, I'm all about diving deep into those plot twists and character arcs! When I'm not binge-watching the latest series or flipping through manga pages, you can find me lost in sci-fi universes, exploring futuristic tech and thrilling space adventures.

Oh, and I've got a soft spot for the supernatural! Ghosts, spirits, and all things mysterious keep me on my toes. As a Leo, I bring that fiery energy wherever I go, embracing life with passion and a bit of drama-who doesn't love a little flair? Music is my other big love; I'm always curating playlists that capture the mood of my day. Whether it's anime soundtracks, upbeat pop, or soothing instrumental, I find that the right tunes make every moment even better. Can't wait to connect with fellow fans who share these interests! рҹҺ¶вңЁ

You can also find me in fanfiction.net and archive of our own.

title: Rain on the Mountain | Aragorn | The Lord of the Rings
description:
How did it come to this?

Loyal to her family, her lands and her people, ThГ©adain, the illegitimate daughter of ThГ©oden, King of Rohan, has little concern for the world that lies beyond her familiar grasslands. When all that she loves is threatened, she must risk the position she has fought long and hard to earn, plunging herself into a conflict she never sought. As she learns of the rising darkness in far off corners of her world, she begins to realise that her fate may lead her beyond the familiar, and may entwine with the fates of others in ways she could never have foreseen.

'Where now the horse and the rider? Where is the horn that was blowing? They have passed like rain on the mountain. Like wind in the meadow. The days have gone down in the West, behind the hills, into shadow...'

title: Birds of a Feather
description:
Arranged marriage was an age-old story that Khushi, the youngest of the infamous Gupta family, who revolutionized and dominated the trading market for generations, knew well.

For it was the only thing she heard growing up.

But that neither prepared her nor comforted her as she got ready that morning. It was an important day, a day where she would trade her surname for a new one, her silence for a new chance, her respect for a new hope, her life for another. It was a day of contracts, both new and old.

As she hid behind the traditional red shawl, knowing that the whole world would be watching her, waiting to pounce, she wondered why her mother never told her about any of the good marriages. The ones that worked out. The ones that had hope. The ones that had love.

Probably because they don't exist, Khushi thought to herself.

Only, destiny had believed otherwise.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

This is a stand alone story that has no connection with the original show, Iss Pyar Ko Kya Naam Doon, except for the names of the lead characters. All other content of this story belongs strictly to the author, Archi.

title: в„Ӯрқ•’рқ•Јрқ• рқ•қрқ•ҡрқ•ҹрқ•’ | H.S |
description:
I lowered myself to my knees, biting my lip softly as I felt him walk up behind me. He brought his arm around me, his hand wrapping around the left side of my jawline, moving against it to the right. It took everything in me not to bite his arm as it passed in front of me.

He stopped his hand right under my chin, his thumb pressing softly on my lower lip until my mouth hung open slightly. 

"Suck it." He said, his voice thick with lust. I took his thumb in my mouth, sucking it softly. With his other hand, he brought my face back against him, wrapping it tightly around my neck, "Good girl." He said, his green eyes barring down at me. 

His shirt hung open, the dark ink engraving his body illuminated by the small light in the room. His butterfly tattoo moving with his breath. 

"You remember the safe word?" He said sternly, and I nodded.

"I need to hear you." He said, the grip around my neck slightly tighter.

I released his thumb from my mouth, licking my lips, "Yes, sir."

He smirked at me, his dimples devilishly appearing on his face as he bent down and kissed me deeply.

-


Harry Styles walks into an LA bar when Carolina Townes instantly captures his eye. From her sassy smug personality, to her free spirit, he becomes completely enamored.

But can he grow past his dark ways, to fully appreciate her the way she wants to be.
