title: рқҗҺрқҗЎ рқҗҢрқҗІ рқҗӢрқҗЁрқҗҜрқҗһрқҗ« вңҝ
description:
"Take responsibility for your actions, Manobal."

Nearly slamming her head on the wall tripping on her knees, she scratched the back of her neck nervously. "How?" 

As if she asked the stupidest question on this planet or if she walked out of an unpolluted location Jennie Kim raised an eyebrow that one look was enough for Lisa to get the cue. 

How dare you, Manobal, question me. Don't you know who I am? You're fired! Jump off my building! Don't show me your face ever again! 

Lisa could practically hear those words echoing in her mind. She shook her head, trying to banish the mental tirade, and cleared her throat with a timid smile. "I mean, it- it was just ...a hug. Nothing happe-"

She paused as Jennie Kim's lips curled. " Pathetic excuse, disappointing isn't it, must be good for liars. " 

Swallowing back the questions Lisa had to blink twice to confirm her eyes weren't mistaken because the simple curl of Jennie Kim's lips twisted upward into a smile. Bad.
Jennie Kim doesn't do smile. The grin spread wider. Her heart sped louder. This is so freaking bad. "Ma'am I-"

"Put a ring on your actions."  

A what? Alas, Lisa looked at the grand glass windows. Just tell me to jump off already, woman. The grim is also waiting to take her soul today surely.
_____
Lisa always has an incredible ability to be in the worst situations at the wrong time only to meet the wrong person. In her 24-year life, she has ambitions, responsibility, a family to be happy with. But maybe a lover to knot with, to watch the spiciest movies, to hold hands in secrecy still pretending to be strangers to hide she seeks. 

And her fate seals her wishes cause again Lalisa Manobal got into the worst situation. At the wrong time. She unwantedly found the wrong person or maybe it was always the right one. Still, somehow, even with all the layers the woman who is her boss, AKA also her legal wife, would wear, the moment when Jennie Kim's arms wrapped around. Lisa knew she was screwed up for a long time.

title: My big baby в•‘KTHв•‘
description:
Right now, we are sitting inside the car, heading to his, or rather, our house, in complete silence. He is driving, and I'm gazing out of the window, lost in my thoughts. And suddenly...

*Horn*

*Horn*

"Taehyung..."

*Crash*

.

.

.

"Mom, who is she?" He asked, bewildered.

"She is your wife, Taehyung," her mom replied.

"Wife? Does that mean I am her husband?" He asked, trying to understand the situation.

"Yes, son."

"Like you and Dad?" He inquired, his curiosity piqued.

title: THE QUEEN WEAKNESS (COMPLETE)
description:
Jennie Kim the Queen B of the school, known as no weakness queen, Daughter of the founder and the schools she's studying at. 
Cold, hard-headed, spoiled brat just simply scary person to deal with and specially hate poor people.



Lalisa Manoban a very simple girl, very soft hearted person, goofy and has hidden talent for dancing and instrument. She's from Thailand but she will be studying to a prestige university of Korea because she's one of the lucky student to get scholarship from them. She's smart and can sacrifice her self just to have peace in her surroundings and lastly she's poor.


How will Jennie Kim treat a very soft person like Lisa and how Lisa will react to the school she will studying in?


Will she be the weakness of the queen?
Or she will be her strength?


..... 


Tipical queen b story but a twist рҹҳү
Pain, selfless decision and too much kind to called pathetic.

title: рҹӮҙ рқҗ“рқҗЎрқҗ«рқҗЁрқҗ®рқҗ рқҗЎ рқҗҮрқҗўрқҗ¬ рқҗҢрқҗһрқҗҰрқҗЁрқҗ«рқҗўрқҗһрқҗ¬ рқҗӢрқҗўрқҗһрқҗ¬ рқҗҖ рқҗ“рқҗ«рқҗҡрқҗ рқҗўрқҗң рқҗ’рқҗӯрқҗЁрқҗ«рқҗІ
description:
бҙҸЙҙбҙҮ бҙҳЙӘбҙҮбҙ„бҙҮ кң°бҙӣ. бҙҚбҙҸЙҙбҙҮбҙӢКҸ бҙ…. Кҹбҙңкң°кң°КҸ
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

вққ....ЙӘбҙӣ бҙЎбҙҖкңұ кңұбҙңбҙҳбҙҳбҙҸкңұбҙҮбҙ… бҙӣбҙҸ КҷбҙҮ бҙҖ кңұбҙҮбҙ„КҖбҙҮбҙӣ, кңұбҙҮбҙ„КҖбҙҮбҙӣ бҙӣКңбҙҖбҙӣ бҙҸЙҙКҹКҸ КңбҙҮ бҙӢЙҙбҙҮбҙЎ. Кҷбҙңбҙӣ КңбҙҮ бҙ…ЙӘбҙ…Йҙ'бҙӣ бҙҮxбҙҳбҙҮбҙ„бҙӣ, бҙӣКңбҙҖбҙӣ бҙҖкң°бҙӣбҙҮКҖ КҷбҙҮбҙ„бҙҸбҙҚЙӘЙҙЙў бҙӣКңбҙҮ бҙҳЙӘКҖбҙҖбҙӣбҙҮ бҙӢЙӘЙҙЙў, КңЙӘкңұ бҙҚбҙҮбҙҚбҙҸКҖЙӘбҙҮкңұ бҙЎбҙҸбҙңКҹбҙ… КҷбҙҮ бҙҳКҹбҙҖКҸбҙҮбҙ… ЙӘЙҙ кң°КҖбҙҸЙҙбҙӣ бҙҸкң° бҙҮбҙ бҙҮКҖКҸбҙҸЙҙбҙҮ.... Кҷбҙңбҙӣ ЙӘбҙӣ'кңұ бҙҸбҙӢбҙҖКҸ, КҷбҙҮбҙ„бҙҖбҙңкңұбҙҮ КңбҙҮ бҙҚбҙҖЙҙбҙҖЙўбҙҮбҙ… бҙӣбҙҸ кңұбҙҮбҙҮ КңбҙҮКҖ бҙҖЙўбҙҖЙӘЙҙ.вқһ

в–ғв–ғв–ғв–ғв–ғв–ғв–ғв–ғв–ғв–ғв–ғ

бҙҖбҙңбҙӣКңбҙҸКҖ - кңұбҙҮКңКҸбҙҖКңбҙҖКҖбҙҖ
кңұбҙҸбҙңКҖбҙ„бҙҮ - бҙҸЙҙбҙҮ бҙҳЙӘбҙҮбҙ„бҙҮ
рҹҶӮрҹ…»рҹ…ҫрҹҶҶ рҹҶ„рҹ…ҝрҹ…ірҹ…°рҹҶғрҹ…ҙрҹҶӮ
Tous Droits RГ©servГ©s
authorBio:
вққбҙҮбҙ бҙҮКҖКҸбҙӣКңЙӘЙҙЙў бҙӣКңбҙҖбҙӣ бҙӢЙӘКҹКҹкңұ бҙҚбҙҮ бҙҚбҙҖбҙӢбҙҮкңұ бҙҚбҙҮ кң°бҙҮбҙҮКҹ бҙҖКҹЙӘбҙ бҙҮ.вқһ

вҳҜбҙҠбҙңкңұбҙӣ бҙ„бҙҖКҹКҹ бҙҚбҙҮ "КҖбҙҮЙҙ"

вңӮв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳ

бҙҚбҙҖКҖКҖЙӘбҙҮбҙ… бҙӣбҙҸ: бҙҳбҙҸКҖбҙӣЙўбҙҖкңұ бҙ…. бҙҖбҙ„бҙҮ

вҷӣ бҙ…бҙҮбҙҳКҖбҙҮкңұкңұбҙҮбҙ…
вҷҡ бҙЎКҖЙӘбҙӣбҙҮКҖ & КҖбҙҮбҙҖбҙ…бҙҮКҖ
вҷқ бҙҚбҙңкңұЙӘбҙ„ КҹбҙҸбҙ бҙҮКҖ
вҷһ КҷЙӘбҙҳбҙҸКҹбҙҖКҖ & бҙ„КҖбҙҖбҙўКҸ
вҷң бҙўбҙҸбҙ…ЙӘбҙҖбҙ„ кңұЙӘЙўЙҙ: бҙҖКҖЙӘбҙҮкңұ
вҷҹЙўбҙҮЙҙкңұКңЙӘЙҙ ЙӘбҙҚбҙҳбҙҖбҙ„бҙӣ бҙҳКҹбҙҖКҸбҙҮКҖ.
вҷҹЙҙЙӘЙўКңбҙӣбҙ„бҙҸКҖбҙҮ КҹбҙҸбҙ бҙҮКҖ.
вҷҹКҖбҙҖЙҙбҙ…бҙҸбҙҚ бҙңбҙҳбҙ…бҙҖбҙӣбҙҮкңұ ЙӘЙҙ КҷбҙҸбҙҸбҙӢкңұ.
вҷҹКңбҙҖбҙ бҙҮ 700+ КҷбҙҸбҙҸбҙӢкңұ бҙҸЙҙ бҙ…КҖбҙҖкң°бҙӣкңұ.
вҷҹКңбҙҖбҙ бҙҮ бҙЎЙӘКҹбҙ… ЙӘбҙҚбҙҖЙўЙӘЙҙбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ.
вҷҹКҸбҙҸбҙң бҙҚбҙҖКҸ бҙӣбҙҖКҹбҙӢ бҙӣбҙҸ бҙҚбҙҮ бҙҖЙҙКҸбҙӣЙӘбҙҚбҙҮ.
вҷҹкңұКҹбҙҮбҙҮбҙҳ бҙ…бҙҮбҙҳКҖЙӘбҙ бҙҮбҙ…
вҷҹКңбҙҖбҙ бҙҮ 0% кңұбҙҸбҙ„ЙӘбҙҖКҹ кңұбҙӢЙӘКҹКҹкңұ

рҹҢә ЙӘ'бҙҚ бҙ бҙҮКҖКҸ, бҙ бҙҮКҖКҸ, бҙ бҙҮКҖКҸ бҙӣбҙҖКҹбҙӢбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙ бҙҮ бҙЎКңбҙҮЙҙ ЙӘбҙӣ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚбҙҮкңұ бҙӣбҙҸ бҙҚбҙҮкңұкңұбҙҖЙўбҙҮ КҷбҙҸбҙҖКҖбҙ… Кҷбҙңбҙӣ ЙӘ бҙҖбҙҚ ЙҙбҙҸбҙӣ кңұбҙӢЙӘКҹКҹбҙҮбҙ… ЙӘЙҙ бҙ„бҙҸЙҙбҙ бҙҮКҖкңұбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙкңұ кңұбҙҸ ЙӘкң° ЙӘ кңұбҙҖКҸ кңұбҙҸбҙҚбҙҮбҙӣКңЙӘЙҙЙў бҙҸкң°кң°-бҙҳбҙңбҙӣбҙӣЙӘЙҙЙў, ЙӘ'бҙҚ КҖбҙҮбҙҖКҹКҹКҸ кңұбҙҸКҖКҖКҸ. ЙӘ КҹЙӘбҙӢбҙҮ бҙҖбҙ…бҙ…КҖбҙҮкңұкңұЙӘЙҙЙў бҙҳбҙҮбҙҸбҙҳКҹбҙҮ бҙҖкңұ бҙ…бҙҮбҙҖКҖ, бҙ…бҙҖКҖКҹЙӘЙҙЙўкңұ, кңұбҙЎбҙҮбҙҮбҙӣКңбҙҮбҙҖКҖбҙӣ бҙҮбҙӣбҙ„. КҷбҙҮбҙ„бҙҖбҙңкңұбҙҮ ЙӘ'бҙҚ бҙ бҙҮКҖКҸ КҷбҙҖбҙ… бҙЎЙӘбҙӣКң ЙҙбҙҖбҙҚбҙҮкңұ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… бҙҖкң°кң°бҙҮбҙ„бҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙбҙҖбҙӣбҙҮ ЙҙЙӘбҙ„бҙӢЙҙбҙҖбҙҚбҙҮкңұ КҹЙӘбҙӢбҙҮ бҙӣКңбҙҖбҙӣ бҙҠбҙңкңұбҙӣ бҙЎбҙҸКҖбҙӢкңұ кң°бҙҸКҖ бҙҚбҙҮ.

where casting brings people together







tiara lakeland gets casted into a movie with two of her old friends, harper oakley and brady noon. 

brady decides to stream one night with his friend, walker scobell. later on, walker reveals that he may have a teensy crush on tiara.

they meet for the first time at a party, which leads to their friends meeting, more and more hangouts, and new relationships forming.

but what happens when tiara cant forget about how the last guy that she dated treated her, and how she cant bring herself to fully trust anyone?

find out, or dont, the choice is yours рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷҖпёҸ

title: Countdown to Insanity (MHA x Kurumi Tokisaki)
description:
All I ever wanted was freedom and to be myself, but because of my power those around me tried to brainwash me into becoming a hero like everyone else. And when they failed, they locked me away and replaced me with a fake that fell for their tricks. I thought this was my fate until I was freed by those who seek my aid. Now I will become a nightmare for this society, a nightmare that it will never awaken from.

This is my first fanfic so I'm a little nervous so please don't be too hard on me but please give me your thoughts so I can hopefully improve. There probably won't be any romance in this as I'm not really good at writing it nor do I really like it but there might be some stuff here and there.

I don't own my hero academia, date a live or any of the characters in this story unless they're an oc.  Any art or pictures used in this fic do not belong to me.

title: HI3: Her Sheathe, His Thunder (R.Mei x M.OC)
description:
It was a stroke of luck, he thought. A meeting that shouldn't have happened, but it did, and it brought them together.

He was pulled into a story that had already existed; a nobody, whose mere presence changed the narrative of what should have been.

There, he found her when she sought peace, and his presence quieted the loud thunder.

She, who had been denied what was missing from her life, found it through him. He, unsure of his path and growth, received guidance from her. Together, their actions might have complicated matters significantly.

title: The escapee - Marvel
description:
Fourteen-year-old Seven has spent her entire life imprisoned in the HYDRA and Red Room facility, experimented on for as long as she can remember. When she finds herself on the unfamiliar streets of New York without any friends or family, she's sure she's doomed.

When fourteen-year-old Peter Parker sees an unfamiliar teenager on one of the rooftops of New York, he ends up making a friend. When he ends up dragging her away into the Avenger's tower, how will they react to the enhanced they find eating in their kitchen, especially when she seems to be full of surprises.  

Each chapter is approximately 2,000 words long. 
Set two years after Age of Ultron, not following the plots of any other following films.
I do not own any of the characters except Seven, all others belong to the Marvel cinematic universe.

description:
Evelyn  had lost everything the day Hydra took her. Her friends, her family, and her freedom. She had given up hope and then The Avengers  attacked the base she was at and saved her; taking her to the Tower to heal. 

The Avengers are determined to help the young woman heal and get a handle on her new life while helping her figure out why she was targeted.  Bucky Barnes sees something in her he didn't think he'd ever see again.

While at the Tower she begins to heal and discover how resilient she really is.

title: Unexpectedly Married || Taehyung вң“
description:
"I always dreamt of marrying someone of my choice. I wanted to marry someone I love, someone who'd propose me before our marriage"

I said, trying to get a little emotional, 'fake' tears already welling up in my eyes so that he feels guilty and refuses to marry me.

But no, instead he got on one knee, held my hand and stared up at me before speaking,

"Park Jieun... will you marry me?"

...and all my effort went down the drain.

'What did I even expected from this cold brat?'

вҖў вҖў вҖў вҖў вҖў вҖў вҖў вҖў вҖў

Who knew she was destined to be bonded with her brother's bestfriend, Kim Taehyung, who apparently belonged to a Mafia Family? It was all 'unexpected'.

Deprived of a motherly affection, Taehyung never opened up to anyone.

He knew that things between them both will never work because of this sudden thing that pulled him back whenever he tried to get close to her.

But little did they know, things will be all unexpected.

title: Green |  Bellamy Blake
description:
"You say that you have a whole hell of problems, but you underestimate the hell I've been through," I murmur, as he tilts his head downwards towards mine.

He glances back in forth between my eyes for a moment before taking my cheek in his hand. He brings his lips centimetres from mine.  


"We can walk through any hell the world throws at us," he whispers finally before presses his lips against mine. 

~~~~
After Hailey Arrette Kane is found as being a second child to Coralie Kane, she is forced into the Skybox per her sister's request. Her sister, Arlo Riv Kane, managed to convince her dad and the council that she needed to die in Hailey's place, allowing Hailey to live just as long as she did but in the Skybox. After her 21st birthday, which marked her fourth year in the Skybox, the council made a decision. They were going to send 100 delinquents to the ground as an experiment to see whether the level of radiation was survivable or not. In doing so, they managed to sentence almost all of them to an untimely death that was almost inevitable.

With the idea of freedom, Hailey knows that she is never safe and that if weaknesses are shown, someone will use them against her. Will she be able to overcome her emotional and mental walls, even if it means that she'd be vulnerable? 
 
Being on the ground will change Hailey in ways that the people on the ark would never expect. She will find a better version of herself. Hailey will become what she was always meant to be, a warrior.

title: Loving You - Dramione/Blinny Veela
description:
*WINNER OF THE GOLDEN SNITCH FROM THE 2020 SEEKER AWARDS*

Giving him a skeptical look, she stepped away and out of his arms, almost regretting it instantly but ignoring that feeling as she pushed past him. "You better not let your little girlfriend catch you holding me like that.

"Are you jealous, Hermione?"

She stopped and looked back at him. "What on earth gave you that idea?"

He was smirking, his hands in his pockets as he slowly walked towards her. "Because I'm fairly certain that Pansy Parkinson is not and never will be my girlfriend."

He stopped in front of her and she raised an eyebrow, crossing her arms over her chest as she shifted her weight to one leg, almost losing her balance before catching it again. "Then what was that display at the Black Lake the other day?"

"Were you watching me?" He grinned at her, and when she didn't respond, Draco could help but laugh. "You are jealous!"



Draco Malfoy and Blaise Zabini are both Veelas, and they are trying to get close to their mates, Hermione and Ginny respectively. However, getting their girls will prove more difficult than they had hoped.

Sequel is now up, titled 'Forever and Always'!

WINNER OF THE GOLDEN SNITCH AWARD IN THE SEEKER AWARDS

*::* аӯӯ ЛҡвӮ“

рқ‘°рқ‘ө рқ‘ҫрқ‘Ҝрқ‘°рқ‘Әрқ‘Ҝ...

     Lynn Loud Jr. has never thought about Marley Sterling. Of course she's heard the name, catching a stolen glance or two, but their differing personalities could never get along. Marley appeared to be the perfect girl; she was smart, every strum of her guitar echoed like heaven's harps, and she was friendly. She was a Royal Woods cherub; her very presence, an embodiment of cascading love and affection. Someone couldn't be so perfect, could they? That's what Lynn wanted to get to the bottom of; she wanted to know the real Marley.

рқ‘¶рқ‘№...

     Marley sterling has thought about Lynn Loud, she would be a liar if she said she hadn't. Being an athletic prodigy brought it's silent admirers, one of them being Marley. Maybe it was that viridescent gaze or those deep dimples, but Marley couldn't help but be practically entranced. She was like a picture frame that Marley wanted to look at all day. She couldn't, though, so she opted for small glances in crowded hallways, her eyes drawn to the athlete like a moth to a flame. There was something curious about Lynn that attracted Royal Wood's local musician.









Lynn Loud Jr. x fem reader

title: Disgrace
description:
You were a Potter. You grew up with Harry, your twin brother, in the same dreadful situation. You had the same lightning bolt scar, but on your neck. And you had the same blood, or so you thought. 

When you entered Hogwarts and were sorted into Slytherin house, your world fell apart. You found out you weren't like your parents, and were a disgrace to your family name. 

Then a blonde haired boy, who had seemed to hate you for your half blood statues, helped you through the transition. 

"But you hate Half bloods." You sniffled. 

"Well apparently not all of them." You looked up at the warm smile he gave you and accepted his hand standing up. 

"Thank you Malfoy." 

"Anytime, Potter."

title: You're My Flower || Tom Riddle
description:
в—ҰвҖўв—Ҹв—үвңҝ A Tom Riddle Fanfiction  вңҝв—үв—ҸвҖўв—Ұ
( characters, places and some scenes belonged to J.K Rowling вқӨпёҸ) 

"Because I loved him too much, a bit too much that the love overflowed and shattered! But the love's still there, isn't it?" she said quietly, her voice getting drowned out by the rain, "Of course he doesn't love me back. But I'll give him everything. Everything that I had." 

The auror thought about it, "And what if I spare him?" 

"You - you would?" 

"Yes. But I will kill you slowly and painfully," he looked down at her, "Would you accept it?" 

Fresh tears spilled out from her eyes, "Then kill me," she sobbed, "Believe me,  love kills you entirely, whether you're alive or dead."

title: Little Annotations | Tristan Dugray
description:
вққ Dear Genevieve,

I don't blame you for not believing in love, I didn't until I met you. You have a way of making me feel happy. Being in your proximity makes me feel better than any drug could (Not that I've done drugs). I have to wonder though, what goes on in that pretty little head of yours Genevieve? What goes on in that incessantly working brain of yours? Because I'll tell you what goes on in mine:

The way you carry yourself. You walk into a room and you command attention without saying a word. You're so intelligent, and you know it. I adore your confidence, and how you know that you're beautiful. Fuck. You're gorgeous. You're like a girl sent from the heavens above. 

We were talking about love letters, and you sighed and said, "Imagine someone being so engrossed with you that you receive love letters."

Well, not to sound like an utter nincompoop, but I've been writing you love letters since we were ten. 

So, Genevieve. Say the word and I'm yours. 

Or don't. 

I'll still love you either way.

Yours, Tristan. вқһ

- -

Amamiya (Y/N) is the fearless and intimidating Student Council President of Mizo Middle School with a reputation of being a ruthless tyrant especially to rule-breakers. She had a deep hatred for delinquents and would ditch them like the plague as much as possible.

But there was one very persistent blonde delinquent who kept on pestering her much to her chagrin. He happened to know one of her deepest secrets and used it as a trump card to blackmail her. And now before she knew it, she slowly entered into his world without her noticing it.

title: My Beginning After the End
description:
(Could have spoilers from Light Novel)

(Some things are changed for the purpose of the story)

At the age of eight Luke was diagnosed with a heart disease. After being sentenced to staying in bed, he picks up a hobby, reading. His favorite book was The Beginning After the End, and his favorite character was Arthur Leywin. Little did Luke know that one day he would end up in this world, after a failure in surgery. 

With his knowledge of the world that Arthur Leywin lives in, can he change things for the better, or will he just make everything worse. 


Luke is given a new and healthy life as Virion Leywin, Ellie's younger twin brother.

title: Wings of an Angel - A Hazbin Hotel Charlie Morningstar x Male Angel Reader Story
description:
With the opening of a hotel aimed at redeeming Sinners, Agent of God, (Y/n) (L/n) is tasked with investigating the prospect of it's initiation. Assisting the Princess of Hell, Charlie Morningstar on her goal of getting this project of hers to work. Yet Hell is a seabed of chaos and misery, which (Y/n) will soon find out. 
Can the powerful Angel help the demon Princess in achieving this monumental task? Or will fate deal a different path for the two that seek the salvation of sinners? 
Whatever awaits the two, their relationship will truly form and blossom through the terrors of Hell's tragic obstacles.
Enjoy your stay at the Hazbin Hotel!

This is an alternative, non-canon take on the popular series, Hazbin Hotel. 
Filled with romance, drama, tragedy and action. 
Allow me to state once more. That this story is NON-CANON to the events of Hazbin Hotel. Yet it does follow the plot in a similar fashion. Altered to fit the narrative of our hero, (Y/n).

All custom artwork included within this story was illustrated by me! Do view my Patreon for more! It also includes my Twitter/X and Instagram if you wish to see more!

Thank you for everything. All of your patience and encouragement has been used to create this story. This is all for you!

title: Spark (Bumblebee Love Story)
description:
*I do not own the Transformers Franchise! Michael Bay and Universal Studios own Transformers! I only own my OC!* 

"I can take care of myself, Bee!" 
"I care about you-too much- to even think about you getting hurt- my-spark-wouldn't take it." 
"Why? Why wouldn't your spark take it, Bee?"
"Beautiful-my spark wouldn't-take it-because you have my spark-you keep me motivated to-protect the ones I-love out there. And- you're- the person I love- the most"

Danielle and Sam Witwicky, fraternal twins,  had no idea what their life will be like after they recently buy their first car together; a dirty, busted up vintage yellow Camaro with racing stripes. They both undergo the rides of their lives as they are forced to help an alien species from a greater evil they could never imagine. During this, a certain spark develops between a particular scout and brunette.... Read to find out!

title: field trip, c. sturniolo (вң”пёҸ)
description:
пјҠвңҝвҳҶвҷӣвҳҶвңҝпјҠ
рқҗқрқҗҡрқҗ¬рқҗЎрқҗҡ has always struggled with her mental health,
but her best friend matt sturniolo is always there to
help her through it. she loves everything about matt...
except his brother. she hates him, and she has since the 
moment she met him. she doesn't think anything will 
ever change that, but now they're stuck sharing a room
on a field trip that they've been forced to partner for. 
she's sure she'll hate it, but spending so much time with
him is making her wonder if he's the person who could 
cure her.

рқҗңрқҗЎрқҗ«рқҗўрқҗ¬ has hated his brother's best friend ever since they
met. they don't agree on anything, they always bicker and 
just completely hate each other. he doesn't want to even look
at her, but his plans are thrown into the dirt when he's forced
to work with her on a project he's about to fail. one week in 
close proximity was never on his 2022 bingo card but, the longer
he spends with her, he realises he's secretly falling for her.

title: |Always| A Fred Weasley F.F (Harry Potter)
description:
Isadora Bennett has been in love with Fred Weasley since they met. Following him around like a lost puppy hoping he one day returns her feelings. Going into her fourth year at Hogwarts she's determined to make Fred Weasley hers. Things don't go as planned when she learns he's fallen for the spunky Quidditch Queen Angelina.

Will Isadora give up finally let go of her four year crush? Or will she prevail making Fred Weasley change his mind about her? And who are her other suitors lurking around the corner?

This is ~ALWAYS~


(I DO NOT OWN RIGHTS TO THESE CHARACTERS
I DO NOT OWN RIGHTS TO HARRY POTTER OR ANYTHING TO DO WITH THE FRANCHISE.)

I wrote this for fun. I'm a fan of the series and I want to see out this goes. I hope you enjoy. 

(Currently still updating)

THIS STORY IS NOT EDITED YET

title: Secret Daughter
description:

title: The Headmaster's Only Mistake
description:
When Harry Potter is receives a letter from Gringotts on his eighteenth birthday he is more than confused. But once there, he is far more than just confused. He feels angry, betrayed, disappointed, but most of all, he feels the need to get revenge on those who wronged him. And, that is exactly what he does.
DISCLAIMER: i don't own Harry Potter, if I did, a bunch of characters would be gay and alive

description:
"рқ“Ёрқ“ёрқ“ҫ рқ“Әрқ“»рқ“® рқ“¶рқ”Ӯ рқ“ҷрқ“ҫрқ“өрқ“Ірқ“®рқ“Ҫ, рқ“Әрқ“·рқ“ӯ рқ“ҳ рқ”Җрқ“Ірқ“өрқ“ө рқ“Әрқ“өрқ”Җрқ“Әрқ”Ӯрқ“ј рқ“«рқ“® рқ”Ӯрқ“ёрқ“ҫрқ“» рқ“Ўрқ“ёрқ“¶рқ“®рқ“ё."
  
"рқ“ҳ рқ“ҙрқ“·рқ“ёрқ”Җ рқ”Ӯрқ“ёрқ“ҫ'рқ“»рқ“® рқ“Ҫрқ“»рқ”Ӯрқ“Ірқ“·рқ“° рқ“Ҫрқ“ё рқ“«рқ“® рқ“»рқ“ёрқ“¶рқ“Әрқ“·рқ“Ҫрқ“Ірқ“¬, рқ“«рқ“ҫрқ“Ҫ рқ“Ҫрқ“ұрқ“Әрқ“Ҫ'рқ“ј рқ“ірқ“ҫрқ“јрқ“Ҫ рқ“јрқ“Ҫрқ“ҫрқ“№рқ“Ірқ“ӯ."
  вҖў
  вҖў
  вҖў
  The oldest sibling is the pressured one in a family, the youngest sibling is the spoiled one, and the middle sibling, is the ghost.
  
  Thalia Zion Vega
  16 year old, younger sister of Trina Vega, older fraternal twin of Tori Vega, student at Hollywood Arts.
  The invisible one in the Vega family.
  
  Hollywood Arts is possibly the only place where people know her for her. Of course, some people still know her as Trina's sister, but with all her hard work and the fact that she managed to get so many parts in the school's play and other things people barely even connect the dots that she is related to Trina.
  For once, she doesn't blend in the shadows.
  
  But what happens when Tori starts attending Hollywood Arts after stealing the show by replacing Trina in the showcase? What happens when Tori starts getting all the parts and all the songs? Will Lia once again fade-away into the shadows? What will happen to her friendships and relationship now that Tori is here?

  After all, nothing lasts forever and life isn't a fairy tale

title: Bakugou X Kirishima's sister (Reader)
description:
*In process of editing*
You're Kirishima's estranged twin sister. You've come back to Japan after pursuing a modeling career in America (Don't give me sass all of y'all are models to me). Much to your brothers surprise your parents have decided to send you to  UA.  You began studying a hero course in America so your knowledge and ability with your quirk isn't totally shit (You're actually kind of a badass).  One student catches your eye, your brothers best friend. But after fixing your relationship, Kirishima makes a simple request, that you can be with whoever you want in class but do not pursue a relationship with Bakugou. But of course life can't be that simple. Will you follow what your brother asked or will you ruin the new relationship you two now have?

A #5 ranking in Fanfiction is absolutely insane to me, thank you to everyone who's read or reading my story. I hope you all enjoy it рҹҳҠ

title: The Atrocious Bard and The Little Princeling | Hunter TOH X Gn Reader
description:
Annoying - a word you and the notorious golden guard would use to describe each other.

Hunter finds himself stuck with a sadistic and poetic prankster. Though, through thick and thin, he finds your behavior weirdly endearing. You had a way to make people repulsed of you while at the same time making them used to your presence. What can you say? You were just that charming.

"You're crazy!"

"I am mentally hilarious."

----

Read as you and Hunter, just troublesome insufferable kids, learn to embrace the unfamiliar words 'love and affection'.
